<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
<title>FinLife â€” Financial Life Simulator</title>
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --bg:#0f1f0f;--bg2:#1a2e1a;--bg3:#243824;--bg4:#2e4a2e;
  --gold:#ffd700;--gold-dim:#b89b00;--gold-glow:rgba(255,215,0,.18);
  --green:#00c853;--green-dim:#00843a;--red:#ff3d3d;--red-dim:#a01010;
  --blue:#4fc3f7;--purple:#ce93d8;--orange:#ffa726;--teal:#26c6da;
  --white:#f0f4f0;--muted:#7a9a7a;--border:#2e4a2e;--border-gold:rgba(255,215,0,.35);
  --radius:10px;--radius-sm:6px;--shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.6);--t:.18s ease;
}
html,body{height:100%;background:var(--bg);color:var(--white);font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;overflow:hidden}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg)}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--bg4);border-radius:3px}

/* â”€â”€ SCREENS â”€â”€ */
.screen{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:10}
.screen.active{display:flex}

/* â”€â”€ NEW GAME â”€â”€ */
#screen-new{flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 30%,#1e3a1e 0%,var(--bg) 70%);padding:24px;overflow-y:auto}
.ng-card{width:100%;max-width:460px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border-gold);
  border-radius:18px;padding:32px 28px;box-shadow:var(--shadow),0 0 60px rgba(255,215,0,.06);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px}
.ng-logo{text-align:center}
.ng-logo .logo-ico{font-size:48px;display:block;margin-bottom:4px}
.ng-logo h1{font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1px;text-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(255,215,0,.4)}
.ng-logo p{color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;margin-top:3px}
.fg{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
.fg label{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px}
.fg input,.fg select{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
  color:var(--white);padding:9px 13px;font-size:14px;outline:none;transition:border-color var(--t);width:100%}
.fg input:focus,.fg select:focus{border-color:var(--gold)}
.fg select option{background:var(--bg3)}
.sc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px}
.sc-card{background:var(--bg3);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:12px 8px;
  text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--t);user-select:none}
.sc-card:hover{background:var(--bg4);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.sc-card.sel{border-color:var(--gold);background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg3),rgba(255,215,0,.08))}
.sc-card .ico{font-size:24px;display:block;margin-bottom:4px}
.sc-card .nm{font-weight:700;font-size:12px}
.sc-card .dc{color:var(--muted);font-size:10px;margin-top:2px}
.sc-card .mn{color:var(--green);font-size:10px;font-weight:600;margin-top:3px}
.btn-start{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2a5a2a,#3d8c3d);border:1.5px solid var(--gold);
  border-radius:var(--radius);color:var(--gold);font-size:15px;font-weight:700;padding:13px;
  cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:.5px;transition:all var(--t);box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(255,215,0,.1)}
.btn-start:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3d8c3d,#4fa04f);box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(255,215,0,.2);transform:translateY(-1px)}

/* â”€â”€ GAME SCREEN â”€â”€ */
#screen-game{flex-direction:column;background:var(--bg);overflow:hidden}

/* Stats Bar */
#stats-bar{background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-gold);padding:8px 14px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;flex-wrap:wrap}
#char-summary{min-width:100px}
#char-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:130px}
#char-age-job{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)}
.sdiv{width:1px;height:32px;background:var(--border);flex-shrink:0}
#stat-bars{display:flex;gap:12px;flex:1;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}
.si{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;min-width:72px}
.sl{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px}
.sb{height:5px;background:var(--bg4);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
.sbf{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width .4s}
.sbf.health{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--green-dim),var(--green))}
.sbf.happy{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f5720a,var(--orange))}
.sbf.smarts{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1976d2,var(--blue))}
.sv{font-size:10px;font-weight:700}
#nw-display{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;flex-shrink:0}
#nw-label{font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600}
#nw-value{font-size:20px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.5px;transition:color .3s}
#nw-value.pos{color:var(--green)}
#nw-value.neg{color:var(--red)}
#nw-delta{font-size:10px;font-weight:600}
#nw-delta.pos{color:var(--green)}
#nw-delta.neg{color:var(--red)}

/* Game Body */
#game-body{display:flex;flex:1;overflow:hidden}

/* Left Panel - Tabs */
#left-panel{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;border-right:1px solid var(--border)}
.tabs{display:flex;background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0}
.tab-btn{flex:1;padding:9px 6px;background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;
  font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--t);border-bottom:2px solid transparent;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px}
.tab-btn:hover{color:var(--white);background:var(--bg3)}
.tab-btn.active{color:var(--gold);border-bottom-color:var(--gold)}
.tab-content{display:none;flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:12px}
.tab-content.active{display:block}

/* Right Panel - Actions */
#right-panel{width:220px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:var(--bg);overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0}
.actions-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;padding:10px}
.act-btn{padding:10px 6px;background:var(--bg2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
  cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--t);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;text-align:center;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;color:var(--white);user-select:none}
.act-btn .aico{font-size:18px}
.act-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.act-btn.age{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);grid-column:1/-1;padding:12px}
.act-btn.age:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg3),rgba(255,215,0,.1));box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(255,215,0,.15)}
.act-btn.job{border-color:var(--blue)}
.act-btn.bank{border-color:var(--teal)}
.act-btn.invest{border-color:var(--green)}
.act-btn.realty{border-color:var(--orange)}
.act-btn.crypto{border-color:var(--purple)}
.act-btn.hustle{border-color:#80cbc4}
.act-btn.edu{border-color:#ef9a9a}
.act-btn.biz{border-color:#ffb74d}
.act-btn.sponsors{border-color:#f48fb1;color:#f48fb1}
.act-btn.sponsors:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg3),rgba(244,143,177,.1))}
.act-btn.fitness{border-color:#81c784;color:#81c784}
.act-btn.fitness:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg3),rgba(129,199,132,.1))}
.act-btn:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none}

/* Chart Area */
#chart-area{flex-shrink:0;padding:8px 10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
#chart-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:4px;font-weight:600}
#nw-chart{width:100%;height:80px;display:block}

/* Timeline */
#timeline{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px 10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
#timeline-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:600}
.tl-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:7px;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.tl-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:5px}
.tl-dot.good{background:var(--green)}.tl-dot.bad{background:var(--red)}.tl-dot.info{background:var(--blue)}.tl-dot.gold{background:var(--gold)}
.tl-age{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);flex-shrink:0;min-width:22px}
.tl-text{font-size:11px;line-height:1.4}

/* â”€â”€ INBOX (inside actions area) â”€â”€ */
.act-btn.inbox{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}
.act-btn.inbox:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg3),rgba(255,215,0,.08))}
.inbox-badge-btn{position:absolute;top:4px;right:6px;min-width:18px;height:16px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--red);color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:0 5px;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.inbox-badge-btn.show{display:flex}
.inbox-item{padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--t);background:var(--bg2);text-align:left}
.inbox-item:hover{border-color:var(--gold-dim)}
.inbox-item.unread{border-left:3px solid var(--gold)}
.inbox-item.read{opacity:.55}
.inbox-item.bill{border-left-color:var(--orange)}
.inbox-item.news{border-left-color:var(--blue)}
.ii-hdr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:3px}
.ii-date{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px}
.ii-subject{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.35}
.ii-preview{font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.3;margin-top:3px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}

/* Tab Panels Content */
.section{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px}
.section h3{font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.6px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px;font-weight:700}
.info-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.info-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.ir-label{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)}
.ir-value{font-size:12px;font-weight:600}
.ir-value.pos{color:var(--green)}.ir-value.neg{color:var(--red)}.ir-value.gold{color:var(--gold)}

/* Credit Score Arc */
.cs-wrap{text-align:center}
#credit-canvas{width:120px;height:70px}
.cs-score{font-size:22px;font-weight:800}
.cs-grade{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px}

/* Stock Table */
.stock-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px}
.stock-table th{color:var(--muted);font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;padding:3px 5px;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.stock-table td{padding:4px 5px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.stock-table tr:last-child td{border:none}
.chg-pos{color:var(--green)}.chg-neg{color:var(--red)}

/* Crypto grid */
.crypto-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px}
.crypto-card{background:var(--bg3);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:8px}
.cc-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--purple)}
.cc-price{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-top:2px}
.cc-hold{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)}

/* Progress bars */
.prog-wrap{background:var(--bg4);border-radius:3px;height:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:4px}
.prog-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width .4s}
.prog-fill.green{background:var(--green)}.prog-fill.blue{background:var(--blue)}.prog-fill.gold{background:var(--gold)}.prog-fill.purple{background:var(--purple)}

/* Cash flow bar */
.cf-bar-wrap{height:12px;background:var(--bg4);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;margin:6px 0;position:relative}
.cf-fill{height:100%;border-radius:6px;transition:width .4s;position:absolute;left:0}
.cf-fill.pos{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--green-dim),var(--green))}
.cf-fill.neg{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--red-dim),var(--red))}

/* â”€â”€ MODAL â”€â”€ */
#modal-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100;background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;backdrop-filter:blur(4px)}
#modal-overlay.open{display:flex}
#modal-box{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border-gold);border-radius:18px;
  max-width:460px;width:100%;padding:28px 24px;box-shadow:var(--shadow),0 0 40px rgba(255,215,0,.08);
  animation:scaleIn .2s ease;position:relative;max-height:92vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  overflow:hidden}
/* When viewport is cramped, constrain to a square so the player doesn't chase a tall modal */
@media (max-height:720px){
  #modal-box{max-width:min(92vh,460px)}
}
#modal-close-x{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(255,61,61,.12);color:var(--red);border:1.5px solid var(--red);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer;z-index:20;
  font-size:16px;line-height:1;padding:0;transition:all var(--t)}
#modal-close-x:hover{background:var(--red);color:#fff;transform:rotate(90deg)}
#modal-box > .modal-choices{flex:1 1 auto;overflow-y:auto;min-height:0}
#modal-box > .modal-body{flex:0 0 auto}
@keyframes scaleIn{from{transform:scale(.9);opacity:0}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}
.modal-icon{font-size:36px;text-align:center;display:block;margin-bottom:8px}
.modal-tag{display:inline-block;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;
  text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:8px}
.modal-tag.opp{background:rgba(0,200,83,.2);color:var(--green)}
.modal-tag.dis{background:rgba(255,61,61,.2);color:var(--red)}
.modal-tag.mil{background:rgba(255,215,0,.2);color:var(--gold)}
.modal-tag.fla{background:rgba(79,195,247,.2);color:var(--blue)}
.modal-tag.exp{background:rgba(255,167,38,.2);color:var(--orange)}
.modal-tag.tip{background:rgba(206,147,216,.2);color:var(--purple)}
.modal-title{font-size:18px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:6px;text-align:center}
.modal-body{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:16px;text-align:center}
.modal-result{background:var(--bg3);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;text-align:center;border-left:3px solid var(--gold)}
.modal-choices{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.choice-btn{padding:11px 16px;background:var(--bg3);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
  color:var(--white);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--t);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;text-align:left}
.choice-btn:hover{border-color:var(--gold);background:var(--bg4);transform:translateX(3px)}

/* â”€â”€ ASSET GRID MODAL (stocks / crypto) â”€â”€ */
#modal-box.wide{max-width:860px}
#modal-box.compact{max-width:380px;padding:20px 18px}
#modal-box.compact .modal-body{font-size:12px;margin-bottom:10px}
#modal-box.compact .modal-choices{max-height:340px;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:4px}
#modal-box.compact .choice-btn{padding:8px 12px;font-size:11.5px}
.asset-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;max-height:62vh;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:4px}
.asset-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:10px 12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
.asset-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold-dim)}
.ac-hdr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;gap:6px}
.ac-name{font-weight:700;font-size:13px}
.ac-ticker{color:var(--muted);font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.5px}
.ac-price{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold)}
.ac-chg{font-size:11px;font-weight:700}
.ac-chg.pos{color:var(--green)} .ac-chg.neg{color:var(--red)}
.ac-chart{width:100%;height:50px;background:var(--bg);border-radius:4px;display:block}
.ac-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)}
.ac-actions{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:2px;align-items:stretch}
.ac-buy-input{width:70px;padding:6px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3);color:var(--white);text-align:right;-moz-appearance:textfield}
.ac-buy-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,.ac-buy-input::-webkit-inner-spin-button{-webkit-appearance:none;margin:0}
.ac-buy-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--green)}
.ac-btn{flex:1;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);color:var(--white);transition:all var(--t)}
.ac-btn.buy{border-color:rgba(0,200,83,.4);color:var(--green)}
.ac-btn.buy:hover{background:rgba(0,200,83,.15)}
.ac-btn.sell{border-color:rgba(255,61,61,.4);color:var(--red)}
.ac-btn.sell:hover{background:rgba(255,61,61,.15)}
.ac-btn:disabled{opacity:.3;cursor:not-allowed}
@media(max-width:700px){.asset-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* â”€â”€ GAME OVER â”€â”€ */
#screen-gameover{flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 20%,#3a1a1a 0%,var(--bg) 70%);padding:24px;overflow-y:auto}
.go-card{width:100%;max-width:500px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(255,61,61,.3);
  border-radius:18px;padding:32px 28px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px;text-align:center}
.go-card h1{font-size:32px;font-weight:800;color:var(--red)}
.go-card .go-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px}
.go-nw{font-size:40px;font-weight:800;margin:8px 0}
.go-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;text-align:left}
.go-stat{background:var(--bg3);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:10px}
.go-stat .gs-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
.go-stat .gs-val{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-top:2px}
.go-achieve{background:var(--bg3);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:12px;text-align:left}
.go-achieve h3{font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.6px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;font-weight:700}
.ach-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:3px 0;font-size:12px}
.btn-retry{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--red-dim),#c62828);border:1.5px solid var(--red);
  border-radius:var(--radius);color:var(--white);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;padding:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--t)}
.btn-retry:hover{opacity:.85;transform:translateY(-1px)}

/* â”€â”€ TOAST â”€â”€ */
#toast{position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(80px);
  background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border-gold);border-radius:30px;padding:8px 20px;
  font-size:12px;font-weight:600;z-index:200;transition:transform .3s ease,opacity .3s;opacity:0;white-space:nowrap}
#toast.show{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);opacity:1}

/* Mobile */
@media(max-width:680px){
  #game-body{flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden}
  #left-panel{flex:1 1 0;min-height:0;border-right:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  #right-panel{width:100%;flex:0 0 auto;max-height:52vh;overflow-y:auto;border-top:1px solid var(--border-gold)}
  #right-panel #chart-area,#right-panel #timeline{display:none}
  .actions-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:6px;padding:8px}
  .act-btn{padding:10px 4px;font-size:11px;min-height:60px}
  .act-btn .aico{font-size:20px}
  .act-btn.age{grid-column:1/-1;padding:14px;min-height:52px}
  #stats-bar{padding:6px 10px;gap:8px}
  #char-name{font-size:12px;max-width:110px}
  #stat-bars{gap:8px}
  .si{min-width:56px}
  .tab-btn{font-size:10px;padding:8px 3px}
  #modal-overlay{padding:10px}
  #modal-box{padding:20px 16px;max-height:94vh;border-radius:14px}
  #modal-box.compact{padding:18px 14px}
  #modal-close-x{width:36px;height:36px;font-size:18px}
  .modal-title{font-size:17px}

function triggerDownside(c){
  const d = pick(DOWNSIDES);
  const rawCost = d.apply(c);
  const bank = c.bankId ? BANKS.find(b=>b.id===c.bankId) : null;
  const covFrac = bank ? (bank.covers[d.cat] || 0) : 0;
  const refund = Math.round(rawCost * covFrac);
  const netCost = rawCost - refund;
  c.checking -= netCost;
  const date = currentMonthDate(c);
  let body = `Amount: ${fmt$(rawCost)}\n`;
  if(refund > 0){
    body += `${bank.icon} ${bank.name} insurance covered ${fmt$(refund)} (${Math.round(covFrac*100)}%)\n`;
    body += `Out of pocket: ${fmt$(netCost)}\nStatus: Paid from checking\n\n${d.body}`;
  } else {
    if(bank) body += `${bank.icon} ${bank.name}: no coverage for ${d.cat} on your plan.\n`;
    body += `Status: Paid from checking\n\n${d.body}`;
  }
  addInboxItem({
    type:'bill', icon:d.icon, subject:`${d.subject} â€” ${fmt$(netCost)}`, date, body,
  });
  logEvent(`${d.icon} ${d.subject}: -${fmt$(netCost)}${refund>0?` (insurance -${fmt$(refund)})`:''}`, 'bad');
}

function bankById(id){ return BANKS.find(b=>b.id===id) || null; }

function joinBank(c, bankId){
  const b = bankById(bankId);
  if(!b) return 'Bank not found.';
  const prev = c.bankId ? bankById(c.bankId) : null;
  // Switching fee
  if(prev && prev.id !== b.id){
    const fee = 50;
    if(c.checking < fee) return `Need ${fmt$(fee)} to close your ${prev.name} account.`;
    c.checking -= fee;
  }
  c.bankId = b.id;
  c.bankTenureMonths = 0;
  c.checking += b.signupBonus;
  const date = currentMonthDate(c);
  const covList = Object.entries(b.covers).map(([k,v])=>`  â€¢ ${k.padEnd(10,' ')} ${Math.round(v*100)}% coverage`).join('\n');
  addInboxItem({
    type:'news', icon:b.icon, subject:`Welcome to ${b.name}`, date,
    body:`${b.blurb}\n\nSignup bonus: +${fmt$(b.signupBonus)}\nMonthly fee: ${fmt$(b.fee)}\nAPY bonus on high-yield: +${b.apyBonus.toFixed(1)}%\n\nâ”€â”€ Insurance Coverage â”€â”€\n${covList||'  (none)'}\n\n${prev?`Previous bank (${prev.name}) closed. -${fmt$(50)} closing fee.`:'Welcome aboard.'}`
  });
  return `Joined ${b.name}. +${fmt$(b.signupBonus)} signup bonus credited.`;
}

function maybeEmitBankUpdate(c){
  if(!c.bankId) return;
  if(!pct(0.09)) return;
  const b = bankById(c.bankId);
  if(!b) return;
  const u = pick(BANK_UPDATES);
  const date = currentMonthDate(c);
  // Side effects for certain kinds
  if(u.kind==='loyalty'){ const bonus = ri(25,150); c.checking += bonus; }
  if(u.kind==='fee_waiver'){ c._bankFeeWaivedMonth = (c.monthAge||0); }
  addInboxItem({
    type:'news', icon:u.icon, subject:u.tmpl(b), date,
    body:`From: ${b.name}\n\n${u.body(b)}\n\nâ€” Member Services, ${b.name}`
  });
}

function currentMonthDate(c){
  const monthsSince = Math.max(0, (c.monthAge||264)-264);
  const gameYear = GAME_START_YEAR + Math.floor(monthsSince/12);
  const monthName = MONTH_NAMES[monthsSince%12];
  return `${monthName} ${gameYear}`;
}

function generateInboxItems(c, inv){
  const date = currentMonthDate(c);
  // News / briefing â€” always 1 per month
  const headline = pick(NEWS_HEADLINES);
  const climate = inv.climate || 'normal';
  const moodBlurb = {
    bull:'Markets trending higher. Bulls in control â€” momentum trades working.',
    bear:'Broad selling pressure. Defensive sectors outperform; cash levels rising.',
    bubble:'Euphoric conditions â€” valuations extended far above historical norms.',
    recession:'Recessionary signals strengthen. Utilities and bonds catching bids.',
    normal:'Mixed tape. Rotation between sectors continues; no clear trend.',
  }[climate];
  // Top stock & crypto movers
  const stockMovers=(inv.stocks||[]).map(s=>{
    const h=s.history;const prev=h&&h.length>1?h[h.length-2]:s.price;
    const chg=prev>0?((s.price-prev)/prev)*100:0;
    return {name:s.name,id:s.id,chg};
  }).sort((a,b)=>b.chg-a.chg);
  const topStk = stockMovers[0]; const botStk = stockMovers[stockMovers.length-1];
  const cryptoMovers=(inv.cryptos||[]).map(cx=>{
    const h=cx.history;const prev=h&&h.length>1?h[h.length-2]:cx.price;
    const chg=prev>0?((cx.price-prev)/prev)*100:0;
    return {name:cx.name,id:cx.id,chg};
  }).sort((a,b)=>b.chg-a.chg);
  const topCr = cryptoMovers[0]; const botCr = cryptoMovers[cryptoMovers.length-1];
  const marketPart = `\n\nâ”€â”€ Markets â”€â”€\n${moodBlurb}\nâ€¢ ðŸ“ˆ Top stock: ${topStk?.name||'â€”'} ${topStk?(topStk.chg>=0?'+':'')+topStk.chg.toFixed(1)+'%':''}\nâ€¢ ðŸ“‰ Worst stock: ${botStk?.name||'â€”'} ${botStk?(botStk.chg>=0?'+':'')+botStk.chg.toFixed(1)+'%':''}\nâ€¢ â‚¿ Top crypto: ${topCr?.name||'â€”'} ${topCr?(topCr.chg>=0?'+':'')+topCr.chg.toFixed(1)+'%':''}\nâ€¢ â‚¿ Worst crypto: ${botCr?.name||'â€”'} ${botCr?(botCr.chg>=0?'+':'')+botCr.chg.toFixed(1)+'%':''}`;
  addInboxItem({
    type:'news', icon:headline.icon, subject:headline.subject, date,
    body: headline.body + marketPart,
  });

  // Bills â€” accrue monthly silently; consolidated receipt sent in Jun and Jan
  if(!GS.billAccum) GS.billAccum=[];
  const monthlyCount = ri(2,3);
  const monthlyPicked = [...BILL_TEMPLATES].sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5).slice(0,monthlyCount);
  let monthlyBillTotal=0;
  const monthName = MONTH_NAMES[Math.max(0,(c.monthAge||264)-264)%12];
  for(const b of monthlyPicked){
    const amt = ri(b.min,b.max);
    monthlyBillTotal += amt;
    GS.billAccum.push({monthName, icon:b.icon, name:b.name, amt, copy:b.copy});
  }
  c.checking -= monthlyBillTotal;

  // Receipt in Jun and Jan â€” consolidated itemized statement
  if(monthName==='Jun' || monthName==='Jan'){
    const period = monthName==='Jun' ? 'H1 (Janâ€“Jun)' : 'H2 (Julâ€“Dec prior year)';
    const total = GS.billAccum.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amt,0);
    const byMonth = {};
    for(const e of GS.billAccum){
      if(!byMonth[e.monthName]) byMonth[e.monthName]=[];
      byMonth[e.monthName].push(e);
    }
    let body = `â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�\n   SEMI-ANNUAL BILL SUMMARY\n     ${period}\nâ”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�\n\n`;
    const monthOrder = MONTH_NAMES;
    for(const m of monthOrder){
      if(!byMonth[m]) continue;
      body += `â”€â”€ ${m} â”€â”€\n`;
      for(const e of byMonth[m]){
        body += `  ${e.icon} ${e.name.padEnd(22,' ')} ${fmt$(e.amt)}\n`;
      }
      const subtot = byMonth[m].reduce((s,e)=>s+e.amt,0);
      body += `  ${''.padEnd(24,' ')}------\n`;
      body += `  ${'Subtotal'.padEnd(24,' ')} ${fmt$(subtot)}\n\n`;
    }
    body += `â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�\n`;
    body += `TOTAL (${GS.billAccum.length} bills):  ${fmt$(total)}\n`;
    body += `Status: Auto-paid from checking each month\n`;
    body += `â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�â”�\n`;
    addInboxItem({
      type:'bill', icon:'ðŸ§¾', subject:`Bill Report ${period} â€” ${fmt$(total)}`, date,
      body,
    });
    GS.billAccum = [];
  }

  // Cap inbox to last 40 items
  if(GS.inbox.length>40) GS.inbox=GS.inbox.slice(0,40);
}

function addInboxItem(item){
  if(!GS.inbox) GS.inbox=[];
  GS.inbox.unshift({id:`ib_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7)}`, read:false, ...item});
  if(GS.inbox.length>40) GS.inbox.length=40;
}

function renderInbox(){
  const items=GS.inbox||[];
  const unread=items.filter(i=>!i.read).length;
  const badge=$('inbox-badge');
  if(badge){ badge.textContent=unread; badge.className='inbox-badge-btn'+(unread>0?' show':''); }
}

function showInboxModal(){
  const items=GS.inbox||[];
  $('m-icon').textContent='ðŸ“¬';
  $('m-tag').textContent='Inbox';
  $('m-tag').className='modal-tag fla';
  $('m-title').textContent='Inbox';
  $('m-body').textContent = items.length ? `${items.length} message${items.length===1?'':'s'} Â· ${items.filter(i=>!i.read).length} unread` : 'No mail yet. Age +1 month to receive news and bills.';
  $('m-result').style.display='none';
  const ch=$('m-choices');
  if(!items.length){
    ch.innerHTML='<button class="choice-btn" onclick="closeModal()">Close</button>';
  } else {
    ch.innerHTML = items.map(i=>{
      const preview=(i.body||'').split('\n')[0].substring(0,70);
      return `<div class="inbox-item ${i.read?'read':'unread'} ${i.type}" onclick="openInboxItem('${i.id}')">
        <div class="ii-hdr"><span class="ii-date">${i.date}</span></div>
        <div class="ii-subject">${i.icon} ${i.subject}</div>
        <div class="ii-preview">${preview}</div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('') + '<button class="choice-btn" onclick="closeModal()" style="margin-top:8px">Close</button>';
  }
  $('modal-box').classList.add('compact');
  $('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
}

const EQUIPMENT_TIERS = [
  {tier:1, label:'Basic',             revBoost:0.00, moraleFloor:40, upgradeCost:15000},
  {tier:2, label:'Standard',          revBoost:0.05, moraleFloor:50, upgradeCost:30000},
  {tier:3, label:'Pro',               revBoost:0.10, moraleFloor:60, upgradeCost:60000},
  {tier:4, label:'Premium',           revBoost:0.18, moraleFloor:70, upgradeCost:120000},
  {tier:5, label:'State-of-the-art',  revBoost:0.28, moraleFloor:80, upgradeCost:null},
];
function equipmentInfo(b){
  const tier = EQUIPMENT_TIERS.find(e=>e.tier===(b.equipTier||1)) || EQUIPMENT_TIERS[0];
  const age = b.equipAge||0;
  // Old equipment: age > 5 years OR tier 1 + age > 2 years
  const old = age >= 6 || (tier.tier===1 && age>=3) || (tier.tier===2 && age>=5);
  const next = EQUIPMENT_TIERS.find(e=>e.tier===tier.tier+1) || null;
  return {tier, age, old, next};
}

function startBusiness(idx){
  const bz=BIZ_TYPES[idx]; if(!bz) return;
  const c=GS.char;
  if(c.checking<bz.cost){ showToast(`Need ${fmt$(bz.cost)} to start ${bz.name}.`); return; }
  c.checking-=bz.cost;
  GS.inv.businesses.push({name:bz.name,startCost:bz.cost,value:bz.cost,revMult:bz.revMult,profit:0,age:0,employees:[],equipTier:1,equipAge:0});
  logEvent(`${bz.icon} Started ${bz.name} â€” invested ${fmt$(bz.cost)}`, 'good');
  showToast(`Started ${bz.name}!`);
  saveGame();
  const nw=calcNetWorth(GS.char,GS.inv);
  updateUI(null,nw,nw);
}

function upgradeEquipment(bizIdx){
  const b=GS.inv.businesses[bizIdx]; if(!b) return;
  const info=equipmentInfo(b);
  if(!info.next){ showToast('Already at top-tier equipment.'); return; }
  const cost = info.tier.upgradeCost;
  if(GS.char.checking < cost){ showToast(`Need ${fmt$(cost)} to upgrade.`); return; }
  GS.char.checking -= cost;
  b.equipTier = info.next.tier;
  b.equipAge = 0;
  // Morale bump for all employees
  for(const e of (b.employees||[])){ e.morale = clamp((e.morale||75) + ri(6,12), 0, 100); }
  logEvent(`ðŸ› ï¸� Upgraded ${b.name} equipment â†’ ${info.next.label} (${fmt$(cost)})`, 'good');
  saveGame();
  showHireModal(bizIdx);
  renderBusinessTab();
}

function renderBusinessTab(){
  const inv=GS.inv||{}; const c=GS.char;
  const startEl=$('biz-start-list'); const listEl=$('biz-tab-list');
  if(startEl){
    startEl.innerHTML = BIZ_TYPES.map((bz,i)=>{
      const afford = c && c.checking>=bz.cost;
      return `<button class="choice-btn" onclick="startBusiness(${i})" ${afford?'':'disabled style="opacity:0.5"'}>${bz.icon} ${bz.name} â€” ${fmt$(bz.cost)} Â· ${bz.revMult.toFixed(1)}x revenue mult</button>`;
    }).join('');
  }
  if(listEl){
    const bizs=(inv.businesses||[]);
    if(!bizs.length){
      listEl.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">No businesses owned. Start one above.</p>';
    } else {
      listEl.innerHTML = bizs.map((b,i)=>{
        const emps=(b.employees||[]);
        const wages=emps.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.wage||0),0);
        const avgMorale=emps.length ? Math.round(emps.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.morale||75),0)/emps.length) : 0;
        const moraleTag=emps.length?` Â· Morale ${avgMorale}%`:'';
        const profitTag=b.profit?` Â· Last yr: <span class="${b.profit>=0?'pos':'neg'}">${b.profit>=0?'+':''}${fmt$(b.profit)}</span>`:'';
        return `<div class="section" style="padding:8px;margin:4px 0">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;gap:6px">
            <b>${b.name}</b><span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:11px">Age ${b.age||0}y</span>
          </div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin:3px 0">Value ${fmt$(b.value)} Â· ðŸ‘¥ ${emps.length} Â· Wages ${fmt$(wages)}/mo${moraleTag}${profitTag}</div>
          <button class="choice-btn" style="margin-top:4px" onclick="showHireModal(${i})">Manage Staff</button>
        </div>`;
      }).join('');
    }
  }
}

function payBonuses(bizIdx){
  const b=GS.inv.businesses[bizIdx]; if(!b||!b.employees||!b.employees.length) return;
  const per=500, total=per*b.employees.length;
  if(GS.char.checking<total){ showToast(`Need ${fmt$(total)} for bonuses.`); return; }
  GS.char.checking-=total;
  for(const e of b.employees){ e.morale=clamp((e.morale||75)+ri(10,18),0,100); }
  logEvent(`ðŸŽ� Paid $${per} bonus Ã— ${b.employees.length} at ${b.name} (${fmt$(total)})`, 'good');
  saveGame(); showHireModal(bizIdx); renderBusinessTab();
}
function raiseWages(bizIdx){
  const b=GS.inv.businesses[bizIdx]; if(!b||!b.employees||!b.employees.length) return;
  for(const e of b.employees){ e.wage=Math.round((e.wage||0)*1.08); e.morale=clamp((e.morale||75)+ri(6,10),0,100); e.tenure=0; }
  logEvent(`ðŸ“ˆ 8% raise at ${b.name} â€” team morale up`, 'good');
  saveGame(); showHireModal(bizIdx); renderBusinessTab();
}
function throwTeamParty(bizIdx){
  const b=GS.inv.businesses[bizIdx]; if(!b||!b.employees||!b.employees.length) return;
  const cost=2000 + 300*b.employees.length;
  if(GS.char.checking<cost){ showToast(`Need ${fmt$(cost)} for the party.`); return; }
  GS.char.checking-=cost;
  for(const e of b.employees){ e.morale=clamp((e.morale||75)+ri(5,10),0,100); }
  logEvent(`ðŸŽ‰ Team party at ${b.name} (${fmt$(cost)})`, 'good');
  saveGame(); showHireModal(bizIdx); renderBusinessTab();
}
function trainingProgram(bizIdx){
  const b=GS.inv.businesses[bizIdx]; if(!b||!b.employees||!b.employees.length) return;
  const per=3000, total=per*b.employees.length;
  if(GS.char.checking<total){ showToast(`Need ${fmt$(total)} for training.`); return; }
  GS.char.checking-=total;
  for(const e of b.employees){
    e.morale=clamp((e.morale||75)+ri(8,14),0,100);
    e.boost=Math.min(1.5,(e.boost||0)+0.04);
  }
  logEvent(`ðŸ“š Training program at ${b.name} (${fmt$(total)}) â€” +4% rev each`, 'good');
  saveGame(); showHireModal(bizIdx); renderBusinessTab();
}

function showHireModal(bizIdx){
  const b=GS.inv.businesses[bizIdx]; if(!b) return;
  if(!b.employees) b.employees=[];
  if(b.equipTier===undefined){ b.equipTier=1; b.equipAge=0; }
  $('m-icon').textContent='ðŸ‘¥';
  $('m-tag').textContent='Staffing';
  $('m-tag').className='modal-tag fla';
  $('m-title').textContent=`${b.name} â€” Staff`;
  const curWages=b.employees.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.wage||0),0);
  const curBoost=Math.round(b.employees.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.boost||0),0)*100);
  const avgMorale=b.employees.length ? Math.round(b.employees.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.morale||75),0)/b.employees.length) : 0;
  const moraleTag = b.employees.length ? ` Â· Morale ${avgMorale}%` : '';
  const einfo=equipmentInfo(b);
  const equipLine = `Equipment: ${einfo.tier.label} (T${einfo.tier.tier}, ${einfo.age}y${einfo.old?' â€” OLD âš ï¸�':''}) Â· +${Math.round(einfo.tier.revBoost*100)}% rev`;
  $('m-body').textContent=`Staff: ${b.employees.length} Â· Wages: ${fmt$(curWages)}/mo Â· Boost: +${curBoost}%${moraleTag}\n${equipLine}`;
  $('m-result').style.display='none';
  const ch=$('m-choices');
  // Morale boosters (only if staff exists)
  let moraleBtns='';
  if(b.employees.length){
    const bonusTot = 500*b.employees.length;
    const partyTot = 2000 + 300*b.employees.length;
    const trainTot = 3000*b.employees.length;
    moraleBtns = `<button class="choice-btn" onclick="payBonuses(${bizIdx})" style="border-color:#80cbc4;color:#80cbc4">ðŸŽ� Pay $500 bonuses (${fmt$(bonusTot)} total) Â· +10â€“18 morale</button>`
      + `<button class="choice-btn" onclick="raiseWages(${bizIdx})" style="border-color:#80cbc4;color:#80cbc4">ðŸ“ˆ Raise wages 8% Â· +6â€“10 morale (ongoing cost)</button>`
      + `<button class="choice-btn" onclick="throwTeamParty(${bizIdx})" style="border-color:#80cbc4;color:#80cbc4">ðŸŽ‰ Team party (${fmt$(partyTot)}) Â· +5â€“10 morale</button>`
      + `<button class="choice-btn" onclick="trainingProgram(${bizIdx})" style="border-color:#80cbc4;color:#80cbc4">ðŸ“š Training program (${fmt$(trainTot)}) Â· +8â€“14 morale, +4% boost each</button>`;
  }
  // Equipment upgrade
  let equipBtn='';
  if(einfo.next){
    equipBtn = `<button class="choice-btn" onclick="upgradeEquipment(${bizIdx})" style="border-color:#ffb74d;color:#ffb74d">ðŸ› ï¸� Upgrade â†’ ${einfo.next.label} (T${einfo.next.tier}) â€” ${fmt$(einfo.tier.upgradeCost)} Â· +${Math.round(einfo.next.revBoost*100)}% rev, resets age, morale boost</button>`;
  } else {
    equipBtn = `<div style="padding:8px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:11px">Equipment is at max tier â€” State-of-the-art.</div>`;
  }
  const hireBtns = EMPLOYEE_ROLES.map(r=>{
    return `<button class="choice-btn" onclick="hireEmployee(${bizIdx},'${r.title}')">${r.icon} Hire ${r.title} â€” ${fmt$(r.wage)}/mo Â· +${Math.round(r.boost*100)}% rev</button>`;
  }).join('');
  const fireBtns = b.employees.map((e,ei)=>{
    const m = e.morale||75;
    const moodIco = m>=80?'ðŸ˜„':m>=55?'ðŸ™‚':m>=30?'ðŸ˜Ÿ':'ðŸ˜ ';
    const nameTag = e.name ? ` â€” ${e.name}` : '';
    return `<button class="choice-btn" onclick="fireEmployee(${bizIdx},${ei})" style="border-color:var(--red);color:var(--red)">${moodIco} ${m}% Â· âœ– Fire ${e.title}${nameTag} (${fmt$(e.wage)}/mo)</button>`;
  }).join('');
  const sep = `<div style="height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:6px 0"></div>`;
  ch.innerHTML = equipBtn
    + (moraleBtns ? sep + moraleBtns : '')
    + sep + hireBtns
    + (fireBtns ? sep + fireBtns : '')
    + `<button class="choice-btn" onclick="closeModal()">Close</button>`;
  $('modal-box').classList.add('compact');
  $('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
}

function hireEmployee(bizIdx, title){
  const b=GS.inv.businesses[bizIdx]; if(!b) return;
  const role=EMPLOYEE_ROLES.find(r=>r.title===title); if(!role) return;
  const signing=role.wage; // one month wage as signing cost
  if(GS.char.checking < signing){ showToast(`Need ${fmt$(signing)} upfront to hire.`); return; }
  GS.char.checking -= signing;
  if(!b.employees) b.employees=[];
  const firstNames=['Alex','Jordan','Taylor','Sam','Morgan','Casey','Riley','Jamie','Quinn','Dakota','Robin','Drew','Kai','Reese','Avery','Skylar','Parker','Rowan','Sage','Emerson','Hayden','Frankie','Blake','Marley','Cameron','Harper','Ellis','Sasha','Charlie','Lennon'];
  const lastNames=['Chen','Patel','Nguyen','Kim','Reyes','Cruz','Khan','Singh','Diaz','Lopez','Brooks','Hayes','Miller','Carter','Bennett','Murphy','Walsh','Russo','Cole','Price','Kelly','Shaw','Long','Vega','Ward','Ortiz','Stone','Adams','Sanchez','Burke'];
  const name=`${pick(firstNames)} ${pick(lastNames)}`;
  b.employees.push({title:role.title, wage:role.wage, boost:role.boost, hiredAt:GS.char.monthAge, name, morale:ri(70,85), tenure:0});
  logEvent(`${role.icon} Hired ${name} (${role.title}) at ${b.name} â€” ${fmt$(role.wage)}/mo`, 'info');
  renderBusinessTab();
  // Welcome note from the new hire
  addInboxItem({
    type:'news', icon:role.icon,
    subject:`Hi from ${name} â€” new ${role.title} at ${b.name}`,
    date: currentMonthDate(GS.char),
    body:`Hey boss,\n\nJust wanted to introduce myself. I'm ${name}, your new ${role.title} at ${b.name}. Starting at ${fmt$(role.wage)}/mo. I'll send updates about how things are going, the team vibe, and anything that comes up.\n\nExcited to get started!\n\nâ€” ${name}`
  });
  saveGame();
  showHireModal(bizIdx);
}

function fireEmployee(bizIdx, empIdx){
  const b=GS.inv.businesses[bizIdx]; if(!b||!b.employees) return;
  const e=b.employees[empIdx]; if(!e) return;
  const sev=Math.round((e.wage||0)*1.5); // severance = 1.5 months
  GS.char.checking -= sev;
  b.employees.splice(empIdx,1);
  logEvent(`âœ– Fired ${e.title} at ${b.name} â€” severance ${fmt$(sev)}`, 'bad');
  saveGame();
  showHireModal(bizIdx);
  renderBusinessTab();
}

function openInboxItem(id){
  const item=(GS.inbox||[]).find(i=>i.id===id); if(!item) return;
  item.read=true; renderInbox();
  $('modal-box').classList.remove('compact');
  $('m-icon').textContent=item.icon||'ðŸ“¬';
  const tag = item.type==='bill' ? 'Bill' : (item.type==='offer' ? 'Offer' : 'News');
  $('m-tag').textContent = tag;
  $('m-tag').className='modal-tag '+(item.type==='bill'?'exp':(item.type==='offer'?'gld':'fla'));
  $('m-title').textContent=item.subject;
  $('m-body').textContent=item.body;
  $('m-result').style.display='none';
  const ch=$('m-choices');
  if(item.type==='offer' && item.offer && !item.signed){
    ch.innerHTML = `
      <button class="choice-btn" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4caf50,#2e7d32);color:#fff;font-weight:700" id="ib-sign">âœ… Sign Contract â€” ${fmt$(item.offer.newSalary)}/yr</button>
      <button class="choice-btn" id="ib-decline">â�Œ Decline offer</button>
      <button class="choice-btn" onclick="showInboxModal()">â†� Back to Inbox</button>`;
    $('ib-sign').onclick=()=>{
      const msg = signSportsContract(item);
      $('m-body').textContent = item.body;
      $('m-result').style.display='block';
      $('m-result').textContent = msg;
      ch.innerHTML = `<button class="choice-btn" onclick="showInboxModal()">â†� Back to Inbox</button><button class="choice-btn" onclick="closeModal()">Close</button>`;
      updateUI({monthExp:0,monthInc:0},0,0);
    };
    $('ib-decline').onclick=()=>{
      item.declined=true;
      $('m-result').style.display='block';
      $('m-result').textContent = `Declined ${item.offer.teamName}'s offer.`;
      ch.innerHTML = `<button class="choice-btn" onclick="showInboxModal()">â†� Back to Inbox</button><button class="choice-btn" onclick="closeModal()">Close</button>`;
    };
  } else {
    ch.innerHTML='<button class="choice-btn" onclick="showInboxModal()">â†� Back to Inbox</button><button class="choice-btn" onclick="closeModal()">Close</button>';
  }
  $('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
}

//  UTILITIES
// â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�

const ri = (lo,hi) => Math.floor(Math.random()*(hi-lo+1))+lo;
const rf = (lo,hi) => Math.random()*(hi-lo)+lo;
const clamp = (v,lo,hi) => Math.max(lo,Math.min(hi,v));
const fmt$ = n => {
  if(n===undefined||n===null) return '$0';
  const abs = Math.abs(n);
  const sign = n<0?'-':'';
  if(abs>=1e9) return sign+'$'+(abs/1e9).toFixed(1)+'B';
  if(abs>=1e6) return sign+'$'+(abs/1e6).toFixed(1)+'M';
  if(abs>=1e3) return sign+'$'+Math.round(abs/100)/10+'k';
  return sign+'$'+Math.round(abs).toLocaleString();
};
const pick = arr => arr[Math.floor(Math.random()*arr.length)];
const pct = p => Math.random()<p;
function randn(){let u=0,v=0;while(!u)u=Math.random();while(!v)v=Math.random();return Math.sqrt(-2*Math.log(u))*Math.cos(2*Math.PI*v)}

function createChar(name, scenario){
  const sc = {broke:{cash:500,savings:0,debt:25000,salaryMult:0.7},middle:{cash:5000,savings:2000,debt:8000,salaryMult:1.0},rich:{cash:50000,savings:100000,debt:0,salaryMult:1.5}};
  const s = sc[scenario]||sc.middle;
  return {
    name, monthAge:264, age:22, alive:true, deathCause:null,
    health:ri(65,95), happiness:ri(55,85), smarts:ri(40,90), looks:ri(40,85),
    checking:s.cash, savings:s.savings, highYield:0,
    debt:s.debt, salary:0, creditScore:580,
    education: scenario==='broke'?'high_school':'bachelors',
    inSchool:false, schoolType:null, schoolMonthsLeft:0, schoolCostMonthly:0,
    employed:false, jobTitle:null, careerTierId:'entry', yearsAtJob:0, monthsAtJob:0, performance:ri(50,80), bossMorale:ri(55,75),
    sideHustleIncome:0,
    relationship:'single', spouseName:null, spouseIncome:0, yearsTogether:0,
    kids:0, hasCar:(scenario!=='broke'), hasHouse:false, houseValue:0, houseDebt:0,
    retired:false, lifestyle:'normal',
    creditCards:0, studentDebt:s.debt,
    _graduated:scenario!=='broke', _hadFirstJob:false, _everMarried:false,
    events:[],
    pendingExpenses:[],  // [{name, icon, cost, monthsLeft}]

  };
}

function ageDisplay(char){
  const m = char.monthAge % 12;
  return m===0 ? `${char.age}` : `${char.age}y ${m}m`;
}

function eduIdx(e){return EDU_LEVELS.indexOf(e)}

function computeSalary(char, tier){
  const [mn,mx] = EDU_SALARY[char.education]||[28000,55000];
  const base = rf(mn,mx);
  const sm = 0.5+(char.smarts/100);
  return Math.round(base*tier.salScale*sm);
}

function getJobTier(char){
  const eidx = eduIdx(char.education);
  if(eidx>=5) return CAREER_TIERS[3]; // doctoral+
  if(eidx>=3) return CAREER_TIERS[2]; // bachelors
  if(eidx>=2) return CAREER_TIERS[1]; // associates
  return CAREER_TIERS[0];
}

function tickCareer(char, ev){
  if(char.inSchool||!char.employed) return;
  char.yearsAtJob++;
  const raise = 0.01+(char.smarts/100)*0.02+(char.performance/100)*0.02;
  char.salary = Math.round(char.salary*(1+raise));
  // Promotion check
  const tIdx = CAREER_TIERS.findIndex(t=>t.id===char.careerTierId);
  const tier = CAREER_TIERS[tIdx];
  if(tIdx<CAREER_TIERS.length-1 && char.yearsAtJob>=tier.promYrs){
    if(pct(0.15+(char.performance/100)*0.35)){
      const next = CAREER_TIERS[tIdx+1];
      char.careerTierId = next.id;
      char.jobTitle = pick(next.title);
      char.salary = computeSalary(char, next);
      char.yearsAtJob = 0;
      ev.push({type:'career',text:`Promoted to ${char.jobTitle}! Salary: ${fmt$(char.salary)}/yr`});
    }
  }
  char.performance = clamp(char.performance+ri(-5,5),10,100);
  if(pct(0.03+(char.performance<30?0.1:0))){
    char.employed=false; char.salary=0; char.happiness=clamp(char.happiness-15,0,100);
    ev.push({type:'career',text:'Laid off. Job lost.'});
  }
}

function getAvailableJobs(char){
  const charEdu = eduIdx(char.education);
  return ALL_JOBS
    .filter(j => charEdu >= eduIdx(j.edu))
    .sort((a,b) => b.min - a.min)
    .slice(0,8);
}

const ENV_JOB_IDS = new Set(['farmer','rancher','landscaper','gardener','arborist','env_scientist','conservationist','wildlife_biologist','park_ranger','zookeeper','marine_biologist','soil_scientist','hydrologist','forester','solar_installer']);
const JOB_CATEGORY_ORDER = ['healthcare','tech','trades','education','law','finance','creative','service','transport','environment','sports'];
function jobCategory(j){
  if(ENV_JOB_IDS.has(j.id)) return 'environment';
  return j.sector;
}
function getBalancedJobChoices(char){
  const charEdu = eduIdx(char.education);
  const eligible = ALL_JOBS.filter(j => charEdu >= eduIdx(j.edu));
  const byCat = {};
  JOB_CATEGORY_ORDER.forEach(c => byCat[c] = []);
  eligible.forEach(j => { const c = jobCategory(j); if(byCat[c]) byCat[c].push(j); });
  const shuffle = arr => { const a = arr.slice(); for(let i=a.length-1;i>0;i--){ const k=Math.floor(Math.random()*(i+1)); [a[i],a[k]]=[a[k],a[i]]; } return a; };
  const picked = [];
  const usedIds = new Set();
  // Guarantee one from each category if available
  shuffle(JOB_CATEGORY_ORDER).forEach(cat => {
    const pool = shuffle(byCat[cat]);
    if(pool.length){ picked.push(pool[0]); usedIds.add(pool[0].id); }
  });
  // Fill up to 14 with random eligible extras for variety
  const extras = shuffle(eligible.filter(j => !usedIds.has(j.id)));
  while(picked.length < 14 && extras.length) picked.push(extras.shift());
  return shuffle(picked);
}

function applyForJob(char, job){
  const smartsMod = 0.7 + (char.smarts/100)*0.6;
  char.employed     = true;
  char.jobId        = job.id;
  char.jobTitle     = job.name;
  char.jobSector    = job.sector;
  char.jobMin       = job.min;
  char.jobMax       = job.max;
  char.sportsTeam   = null;
  char.salary       = Math.round(rf(job.min, job.max) * smartsMod);
  char.yearsAtJob   = 0;
  char.monthsAtJob  = 0;
  char.careerTierId = 'tier' + job.tier;
  char.bossName     = pick(['Alex Mercer','Jordan Hayes','Taylor Quinn','Morgan Vance','Dana Rhodes','Sam Whitaker','Casey Lin','Riley Okafor']);
  char.bossMorale   = ri(55,75);
}

function tickCareerNew(char, ev){
  if(!char.employed) return;
  char.yearsAtJob++;
  // Boss morale tracks performance with some lag/noise
  const prevMorale = char.bossMorale||char.performance;
  char.bossMorale = clamp(Math.round(prevMorale*0.5 + char.performance*0.5 + ri(-6,6)), 5, 100);
  const morale = char.bossMorale;

  // Raise logic
  let raisePct = 0;
  let raiseNote = '';
  if(morale >= 75){
    // Likely raise â€” 80% chance, 5-12%
    if(pct(0.80)){ raisePct = rf(0.05,0.12); raiseNote='big raise'; }
    else { raisePct = rf(0.02,0.05); raiseNote='standard raise'; }
  } else if(morale >= 50){
    raisePct = rf(0.01,0.04); raiseNote='standard raise';
  } else if(morale >= 31){
    // Safety zone â€” small raise or flat
    raisePct = pct(0.5) ? rf(0.005,0.02) : 0;
    raiseNote = raisePct>0 ? 'small bump' : 'no raise';
  } else {
    raisePct = 0; raiseNote='no raise â€” performance concerns';
  }
  char.salary = Math.round(char.salary * (1 + raisePct));

  // Promotion every 4 years if morale > 65
  let promoted = false;
  if(char.yearsAtJob % 4 === 0 && morale > 65 && pct(0.30)){
    const cap = char.jobMax || char.salary * 2;
    char.salary = Math.min(cap, Math.round(char.salary * 1.15));
    promoted = true;
    ev.push({type:'career',text:`Promoted at ${char.jobTitle}! New salary: ${fmt$(char.salary)}/yr`});
  }

  // Layoff chances
  let layoffChance = 0.005; // 0.5% random layoff
  let layoffReason = 'random restructuring';
  if(morale <= 30){ layoffChance += 0.35; layoffReason='poor performance'; }
  else if(morale <= 50){ layoffChance += 0.05; layoffReason='budget cuts'; }
  const wasLaidOff = pct(layoffChance);

  // Annual boss message â€” goes to inbox
  const bossName = char.bossName || (char.bossName = pick(['Alex Mercer','Jordan Hayes','Taylor Quinn','Morgan Vance','Dana Rhodes','Sam Whitaker','Casey Lin','Riley Okafor']));
  let status = morale>=75?'ðŸŸ¢ Excellent â€” likely raise':morale>=50?'ðŸŸ¢ Safe':morale>=31?'ðŸŸ¡ Cautious â€” keep it up':'ðŸ”´ At risk â€” improvement needed';
  const updates = pick([
    'We\'re rolling out a new project pipeline next quarter.',
    'The team hit its targets last year â€” nice work from everyone involved.',
    'Leadership is restructuring some reporting lines. Details coming soon.',
    'Budget reviews finished. Some teams expanding, others consolidating.',
    'We\'re refreshing the office tech stack; expect some training sessions.',
    'Customer retention numbers improved â€” thanks to everyone\'s effort.',
    'A few senior folks are moving on. Opportunities may open up internally.',
    'New compliance training rolls out next month. Completion required.',
    'Q4 goals are ambitious but achievable. Let\'s keep the momentum.',
  ]);
  const raiseChance = morale>=75?'HIGH':morale>=50?'Moderate':morale>=31?'Low':'Very Low';
  const layoffRisk = morale<=30?'HIGH':morale<=50?'Moderate':morale<=74?'Low':'Very Low';
  const date = currentMonthDate(char);
  let bodyLines = [
    `Hey ${char.name.split(' ')[0]||char.name},`,
    '',
    `It\'s that time again â€” year-end check-in.`,
    '',
    `Status: ${status}`,
    `My morale on your work: ${morale}%`,
    `Raise likelihood: ${raiseChance}`,
    `Layoff risk: ${layoffRisk}`,
    '',
    `Company update: ${updates}`,
    '',
  ];
  if(promoted) bodyLines.push(`ðŸŽ‰ Big news â€” we\'re moving you up. Salary adjusted to ${fmt$(char.salary)}/yr.`);
  else if(raisePct>0) bodyLines.push(`Pay bump: +${(raisePct*100).toFixed(1)}% (${raiseNote}). New salary: ${fmt$(char.salary)}/yr.`);
  else bodyLines.push(`No pay change this year (${raiseNote}). Let\'s talk at next review.`);
  if(wasLaidOff){
    bodyLines.push('');
    bodyLines.push(`Unfortunately â€” effective today, your position has been eliminated (${layoffReason}). HR will be in touch.`);
  }
  bodyLines.push('');
  bodyLines.push(`â€” ${bossName}, ${char.jobTitle||'Manager'}`);
  addInboxItem({
    type:'news', icon:'ðŸ“§', subject:`Year-end note from ${bossName}`, date, body: bodyLines.join('\n'),
  });

  if(wasLaidOff){
    char.employed = false; char.salary = 0; char.monthsAtJob = 0;
    char.happiness = clamp(char.happiness - 15, 0, 100);
    ev.push({type:'career',text:`Laid off from ${char.jobTitle} â€” ${layoffReason}.`});
  }

  // Performance drift
  char.performance = clamp(char.performance + ri(-5,5), 10, 100);
}

function buildJobChoices(char){
  const jobs = getBalancedJobChoices(char);
  if(!jobs.length){
    return [{text:'No jobs available â€” get more education',fn(){return'No qualifying jobs found. Consider furthering your education.'}}];
  }
  return jobs.map(job => ({
    text:`${job.name} (${job.sector}) â€” ${fmt$(job.min)}â€“${fmt$(job.max)}/yr`,
    fn(){
      applyForJob(char, job);
      return `Hired as ${job.name} in ${job.sector}! Starting salary: ${fmt$(char.salary)}/yr`;
    }
  }));
}

function tickRelationship(char, ev){
  const r = char.relationship;
  if(r==='single'&&char.age>=18){
    if(pct(0.12+(char.looks/100)*0.12)){
      char.relationship='dating'; char.spouseName=genName(); char.yearsTogether=0;
      char.spouseIncome=ri(25000,90000);
      ev.push({type:'good',text:`Started dating ${char.spouseName}.`});
    }
  } else if(r==='dating'){
    char.yearsTogether++;
    if(char.age>=21&&pct(Math.min(0.05+char.yearsTogether*0.07,0.5))){
      char.relationship='married';
      ev.push({type:'gold',text:`Married ${char.spouseName}!`});
    } else if(pct(Math.max(0.08-char.yearsTogether*0.01,0.02))){
      const n=char.spouseName; char.relationship='single'; char.spouseName=null; char.spouseIncome=0; char.yearsTogether=0;
      char.happiness=clamp(char.happiness-10,0,100);
      ev.push({type:'bad',text:`Broke up with ${n}.`});
    }
  } else if(r==='married'){
    char.yearsTogether++;
    char.spouseIncome=Math.round(char.spouseIncome*(1+rf(0.01,0.03)));
    const dChance = char.yearsTogether<5?0.04:char.yearsTogether<15?0.02:0.01;
    if(pct(dChance+(50-char.happiness)/500)){
      const n=char.spouseName; const settle=Math.round(char.checking*0.3);
      char.checking=Math.max(0,char.checking-settle); char.relationship='divorced';
      char.spouseName=null; char.spouseIncome=0; char.yearsTogether=0;
      char.happiness=clamp(char.happiness-20,0,100);
      ev.push({type:'bad',text:`Divorced ${n}. Settlement: ${fmt$(settle)}`});
    }
  } else if(r==='divorced'&&char.age<75){
    if(pct(0.1)){char.relationship='dating';char.spouseName=genName();char.yearsTogether=0;char.spouseIncome=ri(20000,80000);}
  }
}

function genName(){
  const f=['Alex','Jordan','Taylor','Morgan','Casey','Riley','Jamie','Avery','Drew','Quinn','Sage','Blake','Harper','Skyler'];
  const l=['Smith','Johnson','Williams','Brown','Jones','Garcia','Martinez','Davis','Wilson','Anderson'];
  return pick(f)+' '+pick(l);
}

function calcTax(income){
  const brackets=[[11600,0.10],[47150,0.12],[100525,0.22],[191950,0.24],[243725,0.32],[609350,0.35],[Infinity,0.37]];
  let tax=0,prev=0;
  for(const[lim,rate]of brackets){const s=Math.min(income,lim)-prev;if(s<=0)break;tax+=s*rate;prev=lim;}
  return Math.round(tax+income*0.05+Math.min(income,168600)*0.0765);
}

function tickFinances(char, ev){
  // All figures monthly, returned annualized for UI display
  const monthSalary = char.employed ? Math.round(char.salary/12) : 0;
  const monthSide = Math.round((char.sideHustleIncome||0)/12);
  const monthSpouse = char.relationship==='married' ? Math.round(char.spouseIncome*0.5/12) : 0;
  const monthGross = monthSalary + monthSide + monthSpouse;
  const monthTax = Math.round(calcTax(monthGross*12)/12);
  const monthNet = monthGross - monthTax;
  const expTable = {frugal:1500,normal:2333,lavish:3750};
  const livedInProp = (GS.inv&&GS.inv.properties||[]).find(p=>p.livedIn);
  // If living in own property: pay mortgage instead of rent-equivalent (~$1200 of exp), plus upkeep
  const housingAdj = livedInProp ? (livedInProp.monthlyPayment + 300 - 1200) : 0;
  const vehicleCost = vehicleMonthlyCost(GS.inv||{vehicles:[]});
  const monthLiving = (expTable[char.lifestyle]||2333) + Math.round(char.kids*15000/12) + housingAdj + vehicleCost;
  // Monthly debt interest + minimum payment
  if(char.debt>0){
    const interest = Math.round(char.debt*0.05/12);
    const pay = Math.max(50, Math.min(char.debt, Math.round(char.debt*0.01)+interest));
    char.debt = Math.max(0, char.debt+interest-pay);
  }
  // Bank monthly maintenance fee (after fee waiver check)
  if(char.bankId){
    const bk = bankById(char.bankId);
    const waivedThisMonth = char._bankFeeWaivedMonth === char.monthAge;
    if(bk && !waivedThisMonth){
      char.checking -= bk.fee;
    }
    char.bankTenureMonths = (char.bankTenureMonths||0) + 1;
  }
  const monthSavings = monthNet - monthLiving;
  char.checking += monthSavings;
  // Monthly compound interest on savings
  char.savings = Math.round(char.savings*(1+0.02/12));
  // High-yield: base 4% + optional bank APY bonus
  const apyBonus = char.bankId ? (bankById(char.bankId)?.apyBonus || 0) : 0;
  char.highYield = Math.round(char.highYield*(1+(0.04+apyBonus/100)/12));
  // Credit score: drift quarterly
  if(char.monthAge%3===0){
    if(char.debt>0&&char.checking>0) char.creditScore=clamp(char.creditScore+ri(-1,2),300,850);
    else if(char.debt===0) char.creditScore=clamp(char.creditScore+ri(0,2),300,850);
  }
  return {gross:monthGross*12, taxes:monthTax*12, livingCost:monthLiving*12, debtPay:char.debt>0?Math.round(char.debt*0.12):0, annSavings:monthSavings*12};
}

function tickDeath(char){
  // Annual probabilities divided by 12 for monthly check
  let base;
  if(char.age<40)base=0.003/12;
  else if(char.age<50)base=0.007/12;
  else if(char.age<60)base=0.015/12;
  else if(char.age<70)base=0.03/12;
  else if(char.age<80)base=0.07/12;
  else if(char.age<90)base=0.15/12;
  else base=0.30/12;
  const hm=1.0+(50-char.health)/100;
  if(pct(Math.min(base*hm,0.95))){
    char.alive=false;
    char.deathCause=char.age>=75?'Old Age':pick(DEATH_CAUSES);
    return true;
  }
  return false;
}

function tickSchool(char, ev){
  if(!char.inSchool)return;
  char.checking-=char.schoolCostMonthly;
  char.debt+=char.schoolCostMonthly;
  char.schoolMonthsLeft--;
  if(char.schoolMonthsLeft<=0){
    const def=SCHOOL_DEFS[char.schoolType];
    char.inSchool=false; char.education=def.result;
    char.smarts=clamp(char.smarts+ri(5,15),0,100);
    ev.push({type:'gold',text:`Graduated with ${EDU_LABELS[def.result]}!`});
  }
}

function createInvState(){
  return {
    stocks:STOCKS.map(s=>({...s,history:[s.price]})),
    cryptos:CRYPTOS.map(c=>({...c,history:[c.price]})),
    portfolio:{},    // {stockId:{shares,avgCost}}
    cryptoHeld:{},   // {cryptoId:{coins,avgCost}}
    k401:0, ira:0, roth:0,
    properties:[],
    businesses:[],
    vehicles:[],     // [{name,type,price,value,monthlyCost,isElectric,age,depRate}]
    sponsors:[],     // [{name,icon,monthly,monthsLeft,signedAt,category}]
    sponsorOffers:null, // cached current offer set
    sponsorOffersMonth:-1,
    climate:'normal',
    climateYearsLeft:0,
  };
}

function totalVehicleValue(inv){return (inv.vehicles||[]).reduce((s,v)=>s+v.value,0);}
function vehicleMonthlyCost(inv){return (inv.vehicles||[]).reduce((s,v)=>s+v.monthlyCost,0);}

function tickVehicles(inv){
  if(!inv.vehicles) inv.vehicles=[];
  for(const v of inv.vehicles){
    // Monthly depreciation = yearly rate / 12
    v.value = Math.max(Math.round(v.price*0.15), Math.round(v.value * (1 - v.depRate/12)));
    v.age = (v.age||0) + 1;
  }
}

function tickMarket(inv){
  if(inv.climateYearsLeft>0){inv.climateYearsLeft--;if(inv.climateYearsLeft===0)inv.climate='normal';}
  else{
    const r=Math.random();
    if(r<0.07){inv.climate='recession';inv.climateYearsLeft=ri(1,3);}
    else if(r<0.13){inv.climate='bear';inv.climateYearsLeft=ri(1,2);}
    else if(r<0.21){inv.climate='bull';inv.climateYearsLeft=ri(1,3);}
    else if(r<0.25){inv.climate='bubble';inv.climateYearsLeft=ri(1,2);}
    else inv.climate='normal';
  }
}

const CLIMATE_MULT = {
  normal:{stock:1.0,tech:1.0,crypto:1.0,re:1.0},
  bull:{stock:1.4,tech:1.5,crypto:1.3,re:1.15},
  bear:{stock:0.75,tech:0.70,crypto:0.65,re:0.90},
  bubble:{stock:1.1,tech:2.0,crypto:1.5,re:1.0},
  recession:{stock:0.70,tech:0.65,crypto:0.50,re:0.85},
};

function tickStocks(inv){
  const m=CLIMATE_MULT[inv.climate]||CLIMATE_MULT.normal;
  const SQRT12=Math.sqrt(12);
  for(const s of inv.stocks){
    const cm=s.sector==='tech'?m.tech:s.id==='SPY'?m.stock:m.stock;
    const annDrift=(s.avgReturn||0.08)*cm-1;
    const monthlyDrift=annDrift/12;
    const monthlyVol=s.vol/SQRT12;
    const z=randn();
    s.price=Math.max(0.01,+(s.price*(1+monthlyDrift+monthlyVol*z)).toFixed(2));
    s.history.push(s.price);if(s.history.length>50)s.history.shift();
  }
}

function tickCrypto(inv){
  const m=CLIMATE_MULT[inv.climate]||CLIMATE_MULT.normal;
  const SQRT12=Math.sqrt(12);
  for(const c of inv.cryptos){
    const z=randn();
    const monthlyDrift=rf(-0.3,0.5)*m.crypto/12;
    const monthlyVol=c.vol*0.3/SQRT12;
    const ret=monthlyDrift+monthlyVol*z;
    c.price=Math.max(0.00001,+(c.price*(1+ret)).toPrecision(5));
    c.history.push(c.price);if(c.history.length>50)c.history.shift();
  }
}

function tickRetirement(inv, char){
  const baseRet={normal:0.07,bull:0.12,bear:0.02,bubble:0.09,recession:-0.05}[inv.climate]||0.07;
  const z=randn(); const r=baseRet+0.10*z;
  inv.k401=Math.max(0,Math.round(inv.k401*(1+r)));
  inv.ira=Math.max(0,Math.round(inv.ira*(1+r)));
  inv.roth=Math.max(0,Math.round(inv.roth*(1+r)));
  // Auto 401k contribution if employed
  if(char.employed&&char.salary>0){
    const contrib=Math.round(char.salary*0.05);
    const match=Math.round(char.salary*0.03);
    inv.k401+=contrib+match;
    char.checking-=contrib;
  }
}

function tickRealEstate(inv, ev){
  const m=CLIMATE_MULT[inv.climate]||CLIMATE_MULT.normal;
  let rentInc=0, mortPaid=0;
  for(const p of inv.properties){
    const z=randn(); const app=(0.03+0.06*z)*m.re;
    p.value=Math.max(10000,Math.round(p.value*(1+app)));
    if(p.debt>0){const pay=p.monthlyPayment*12;const int=p.debt*0.065;const prin=Math.min(p.debt,pay-int);p.debt=Math.max(0,p.debt-prin);mortPaid+=pay;}
    if(p.rented){p.rent=Math.round(p.rent*1.03);rentInc+=p.rent*12;}
    p.age++;
  }
  if(rentInc>0) ev.push({type:'good',text:`Rental income: ${fmt$(rentInc)}/yr`});
}

function tickBusinesses(inv, char, ev){
  for(const b of inv.businesses){
    if(!b.employees) b.employees=[];
    if(b.equipTier===undefined){ b.equipTier=1; b.equipAge=0; }
    const cm=CLIMATE_MULT[inv.climate]||CLIMATE_MULT.normal;
    const statF=(char.smarts/100)*0.6+(char.looks/100)*0.2+0.2;
    // Employee morale dampens boost: avg morale < 50 cuts effectiveness
    const avgMorale=b.employees.length ? b.employees.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.morale||75),0)/b.employees.length : 75;
    const moraleF=0.4 + (avgMorale/100)*0.7;  // ~0.75 at 50 morale, ~1.05 at 90
    const empBoost=1 + b.employees.reduce((s,e)=>s+((e.boost||0)*((e.morale||75)/75)),0);
    const einfo = equipmentInfo(b);
    const equipF = 1 + einfo.tier.revBoost - (einfo.old ? 0.08 : 0);
    const rev=Math.round(b.startCost*b.revMult*statF*(cm.stock)*rf(0.75,1.25)*Math.max(0.5,Math.log(b.age+2))*empBoost*equipF);
    const wages=b.employees.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.wage||0)*12,0);
    const exp=Math.round(rev*rf(0.55,0.75)+b.startCost*0.05)+wages;
    b.profit=rev-exp; b.value=Math.max(Math.round(b.startCost*0.3),Math.round(b.profit*rf(2,4)));
    b.age++;
    b.equipAge=(b.equipAge||0)+1;
    if(b.profit>0){char.checking+=b.profit;ev.push({type:'good',text:`${b.name} profit: ${fmt$(b.profit)} (wages ${fmt$(wages)}, morale ${Math.round(avgMorale)}%, equip ${einfo.tier.label}${einfo.old?' OLD':''})`});}
    else{char.checking+=b.profit;ev.push({type:'bad',text:`${b.name} loss: ${fmt$(Math.abs(b.profit))} (wages ${fmt$(wages)}, morale ${Math.round(avgMorale)}%, equip ${einfo.tier.label}${einfo.old?' OLD':''})`});}
  }
}

function tickEmployeeMessages(c, inv){
  const bizs=inv.businesses||[];
  for(const b of bizs){
    if(!b.employees) continue;
    const einfo = equipmentInfo(b);
    // Compute biz health for morale drift
    const profitPerEmp = (b.profit||0) / Math.max(1, b.employees.length);
    for(const e of b.employees){
      e.tenure = (e.tenure||0)+1;
      if(e.morale===undefined) e.morale=75;
      // Monthly morale drift
      let drift = ri(-2,2);
      if(profitPerEmp > 5000) drift += 2;
      else if(profitPerEmp < -2000) drift -= 4;
      else if(profitPerEmp < 0) drift -= 2;
      // Old equipment erodes morale over time
      if(einfo.old) drift -= ri(1,3);
      else if(einfo.tier.tier >= 4) drift += 1;
      // Long tenure without pay bump â†’ slight decay
      if(e.tenure > 24 && e.tenure % 12 === 0) drift -= 1;
      e.morale = clamp(e.morale + drift, 0, 100);
      // Message chance: ~12% per employee per month
      if(!pct(0.12)) continue;
      const date = currentMonthDate(c);
      const name = e.name || e.title;
      const roleIcon = (EMPLOYEE_ROLES.find(r=>r.title===e.title)?.icon) || 'ðŸ‘¥';
      // Pool complaints â€” include equipment complaints only when equipment is old
      const problemPool = einfo.old ? WORKPLACE_PROBLEMS.concat(EQUIPMENT_COMPLAINTS, EQUIPMENT_COMPLAINTS) : WORKPLACE_PROBLEMS;
      let subject, body, moodLabel;
      if(e.morale >= 80){
        moodLabel='High';
        const positive = pick(EMPLOYEE_POSITIVES);
        subject = `Good week at ${b.name} â€” ${name}`;
        body = `Hey boss,\n\n${positive}\n\nTeam morale feels strong â€” I'd say we're around ${e.morale}%. No real problems right now.\n\nâ€” ${name}, ${e.title}`;
      } else if(e.morale >= 55){
        moodLabel='Steady';
        const maybeProblem = pct(0.5) ? pick(problemPool) : 'Nothing major going on â€” things are steady.';
        subject = `${b.name} check-in â€” ${name}`;
        body = `Hey boss,\n\nJust a quick update. Workplace morale's around ${e.morale}% â€” people show up, do the work, go home.\n\n${maybeProblem}\n\nLet me know if you want me to look into anything.\n\nâ€” ${name}, ${e.title}`;
      } else if(e.morale >= 30){
        moodLabel='Low';
        const prob1 = pick(problemPool);
        const prob2 = pick(problemPool.filter(p=>p!==prob1));
        subject = `${b.name}: morale is slipping â€” ${name}`;
        body = `Hey boss,\n\nWanted to flag that morale here has been dropping. I'd put it around ${e.morale}% honestly.\n\nTwo things on my mind:\nâ€¢ ${prob1}\nâ€¢ ${prob2}\n\nOptions that would help: a bonus, a raise, a team day, training, or (if the gear is old) an equipment upgrade. Staff actions are in the Business tab under Manage Staff.\n\nâ€” ${name}, ${e.title}`;
      } else {
        moodLabel='Critical';
        const prob = pick(problemPool);
        subject = `${b.name}: considering my options â€” ${name}`;
        body = `Hey boss,\n\nI've got to be honest â€” morale at ${e.morale}% is rough. Multiple issues stacking up:\n\nâ€¢ ${prob}\nâ€¢ Wages haven't kept up with the workload.\nâ€¢ Long stretches without real recognition.\n\nI'm looking around. Happy to talk before I decide anything, but you should know. A bonus, raise, team event, or equipment upgrade from Manage Staff would seriously help.\n\nâ€” ${name}, ${e.title}`;
      }
      addInboxItem({
        type:'news', icon:roleIcon, subject, date,
        body: `${body}\n\nâ”€â”€ Snapshot â”€â”€\nBusiness: ${b.name}\nMorale: ${e.morale}% (${moodLabel})\nTenure: ${e.tenure} months\nWage: ${fmt$(e.wage)}/mo\nEquipment: ${einfo.tier.label} (${einfo.age}y${einfo.old?' â€” OLD':''})`
      });
    }
  }
}

function sponsorsUnlocked(inv){ return totalBizValue(inv||GS.inv) >= 500000; }
function rollSponsorOffers(){
  const inv = GS.inv;
  const bizVal = totalBizValue(inv);
  const scale = Math.min(4, 1 + Math.log10(Math.max(1, bizVal/500000))); // 1x at 500k, ~2x at 5M, ~3x at 50M
  const pool = SPONSOR_CATALOG.slice();
  const picks = [];
  const n = Math.min(5, pool.length);
  for(let i=0;i<n;i++){
    const idx = ri(0, pool.length-1);
    const s = pool.splice(idx,1)[0];
    const monthly = Math.round(s.monthly * scale * rf(0.85, 1.25));
    picks.push({...s, monthly});
  }
  inv.sponsorOffers = picks;
  inv.sponsorOffersMonth = GS.char.monthAge;
  return picks;
}
function signSponsor(offer){
  const inv = GS.inv;
  if(!inv.sponsors) inv.sponsors = [];
  if(inv.sponsors.some(s=>s.name===offer.name)) return `Already signed with ${offer.name}.`;
  inv.sponsors.push({name:offer.name, icon:offer.icon, monthly:offer.monthly, monthsLeft:offer.months, signedAt:GS.char.monthAge, category:offer.category});
  // Signing bonus = 3 months upfront
  const bonus = offer.monthly * 3;
  GS.char.checking += bonus;
  logEvent(`ðŸ¤� Signed sponsor ${offer.icon} ${offer.name} â€” ${fmt$(offer.monthly)}/mo for ${offer.months}mo (+${fmt$(bonus)} signing bonus)`, 'good');
  addInboxItem({
    type:'news', icon:offer.icon,
    subject:`Sponsorship signed â€” ${offer.name}`,
    date: currentMonthDate(GS.char),
    body:`Signed with ${offer.name}.\n\nMonthly: ${fmt$(offer.monthly)}\nTerm: ${offer.months} months\nSigning bonus: ${fmt$(bonus)} (deposited to checking)\n\nPayments will hit monthly in Finances.`
  });
  // Remove from current offers
  inv.sponsorOffers = (inv.sponsorOffers||[]).filter(o=>o.name!==offer.name);
  saveGame();
  return `Signed ${offer.name}. +${fmt$(bonus)} upfront, then ${fmt$(offer.monthly)}/mo for ${offer.months} months.`;
}

function tickSportsOffers(c){
  if(!c.employed || c.jobSector !== 'sports') return;
  // 6% chance per month of receiving an offer
  if(!pct(0.06)) return;
  const teams = SPORTS_TEAMS[c.jobId];
  if(!teams || !teams.length) return;
  // Avoid repeat offers from the current team
  const team = pick(teams.filter(t => t.name !== c.sportsTeam)) || pick(teams);
  const cur = c.salary || 0;
  const baseOffer = ri(team.min, team.max);
  const newSalary = Math.max(baseOffer, Math.round(cur * rf(1.15, 1.8)));
  const raise = newSalary - cur;
  if(raise <= 0) return;
  const months = pick([12, 24, 36, 48]);
  const monthlyPay = Math.round(newSalary / 12);
  const curMonthly = Math.round(cur / 12);
  const raiseMonthly = monthlyPay - curMonthly;
  const y = Math.floor(c.monthAge/12), m = (c.monthAge%12)+1;
  addInboxItem({
    type:'offer',
    icon: team.emoji,
    subject: `${team.name} offers you a contract`,
    date: `Y${y}M${m}`,
    body: `Dear ${c.name},\n\n${team.name} (${team.league}) wants to sign you as a ${c.jobTitle} to a ${months}-month deal.\n\nCurrent: ${fmt$(cur)}/yr (${fmt$(curMonthly)}/mo)\nOffered: ${fmt$(newSalary)}/yr (${fmt$(monthlyPay)}/mo)\nRaise:   +${fmt$(raise)}/yr (+${fmt$(raiseMonthly)}/mo)\n\nSigning bonus: ${fmt$(Math.round(newSalary*0.08))}\n\nIf you accept, your salary is immediately replaced with the offered amount and paid out from the team.`,
    offer:{
      teamName: team.name,
      league: team.league,
      emoji: team.emoji,
      newSalary,
      months,
      raise,
      raiseMonthly,
      signingBonus: Math.round(newSalary*0.08),
    },
  });
}

// â”€â”€ Soccer Season: Fixtures & Standings â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
const SOCCER_LEAGUE_TEAMS = {
  'Premier League': ['Arsenal','Aston Villa','Bournemouth','Brentford','Brighton','Burnley','Chelsea','Crystal Palace','Everton','Fulham','Leeds United','Luton Town','Newcastle United','Nottingham Forest','Sheffield United','Tottenham','West Ham','Wolves','Leicester City'],
  'La Liga': ['Atletico Madrid','Sevilla','Real Sociedad','Athletic Bilbao','Real Betis','Villarreal','Valencia','Girona','Osasuna','Getafe','Celta Vigo','Rayo Vallecano','Mallorca','Cadiz','Las Palmas','Alaves','Granada','Almeria','Espanyol'],
  'Ligue 1': ['AS Monaco','Lille OSC','Olympique Lyonnais','Olympique Marseille','OGC Nice','RC Lens','Stade Rennais','FC Nantes','RC Strasbourg','Stade de Reims','Montpellier','Clermont Foot','Toulouse FC','Stade Brestois','FC Metz','Le Havre','FC Lorient','FC Nancy','Angers SCO'],
  'Bundesliga': ['Borussia Dortmund','RB Leipzig','Bayer Leverkusen','VfB Stuttgart','Eintracht Frankfurt','Hoffenheim','SC Freiburg','Werder Bremen','VfL Wolfsburg','FC Augsburg','Mainz 05','Union Berlin','B. Monchengladbach','Heidenheim','VfL Bochum','Darmstadt','FC Koln','Hertha Berlin','Schalke 04'],
  'Serie A': ['Inter Milan','Juventus','Napoli','AS Roma','Lazio','Atalanta','Fiorentina','Bologna','Torino','Genoa','Monza','Hellas Verona','Udinese','Frosinone','Sassuolo','Cagliari','Empoli','Lecce','Salernitana'],
  'MLS': ['LA Galaxy','LAFC','Seattle Sounders','Portland Timbers','Atlanta United','NYCFC','NY Red Bulls','Toronto FC','Philadelphia Union','Columbus Crew','FC Cincinnati','DC United','Orlando City','New England','Chicago Fire','Colorado Rapids','Vancouver Whitecaps','Austin FC','FC Dallas','Houston Dynamo'],
};

function soccerPlayerTeamLeague(c){
  if(c.jobId !== 'soccer_player' || !c.sportsTeam) return null;
  const teams = SPORTS_TEAMS.soccer_player || [];
  const found = teams.find(t => t.name === c.sportsTeam);
  return found ? found.league : null;
}

function sendSoccerFixtures(c){
  const league = soccerPlayerTeamLeague(c);
  if(!league || !SOCCER_LEAGUE_TEAMS[league]) return;
  const pool = SOCCER_LEAGUE_TEAMS[league].slice();
  // Build fixture list: two legs vs each of 19 opponents = 38 matches across the season
  const shuffled = pool.slice().sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5);
  const months = ['Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec','Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May'];
  const matches = [];
  for(let leg=0; leg<2; leg++){
    const order = shuffled.slice().sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5);
    order.forEach((opp, i) => {
      const monthIdx = Math.floor((leg*19 + i) / 4);
      const mn = months[Math.min(months.length-1, monthIdx)];
      const ha = (leg===0) ? (i%2===0 ? 'H' : 'A') : (i%2===0 ? 'A' : 'H');
      matches.push({m:mn, opp, ha});
    });
  }
  const body = `Fixtures released for the upcoming ${league} season.\n\nYour club: ${c.sportsTeam}\nMatchdays: ${matches.length}\n\n` +
    matches.map((x,i)=>`${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}. ${x.m}  ${x.ha==='H'?'ðŸ� ':'âœˆï¸�'} ${x.ha==='H'?c.sportsTeam+' vs '+x.opp : x.opp+' vs '+c.sportsTeam}`).join('\n') +
    `\n\nGood luck this season. Top 5 â†’ Champions League Â· 6 â†’ Europa League Â· 7 â†’ Conference League.`;
  const y = Math.floor(c.monthAge/12);
  addInboxItem({
    type:'news', icon:'ðŸ“…',
    subject:`${c.sportsTeam} â€” ${league} fixtures released`,
    date:`Y${y}-Aug`,
    body,
  });
}

function sendSoccerStandings(c){
  const league = soccerPlayerTeamLeague(c);
  if(!league || !SOCCER_LEAGUE_TEAMS[league]) return;
  // Build 20-team table: player's team + 19 from league pool
  const others = SOCCER_LEAGUE_TEAMS[league].slice();
  const teams = [c.sportsTeam, ...others];
  // Player position weighted toward top half if recent salary is high
  const salaryFactor = Math.min(1, (c.salary||0) / 10000000);
  // Random placement biased by salaryFactor: 60% top-6 if salary rich
  let playerPos;
  const r = Math.random();
  if(salaryFactor > 0.5){
    playerPos = r < 0.35 ? ri(1,3) : r < 0.7 ? ri(4,7) : ri(8,20);
  } else if(salaryFactor > 0.2){
    playerPos = r < 0.25 ? ri(1,6) : r < 0.7 ? ri(7,14) : ri(15,20);
  } else {
    playerPos = r < 0.15 ? ri(1,7) : r < 0.6 ? ri(8,15) : ri(16,20);
  }
  // Random order for other teams
  const otherOrder = others.slice().sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5);
  const standings = [];
  let otherIdx = 0;
  for(let pos=1; pos<=20; pos++){
    if(pos === playerPos) standings.push(c.sportsTeam);
    else standings.push(otherOrder[otherIdx++]);
  }
  // Generate points (decreasing): champion ~90pts, relegated ~25
  const basePoints = [94,87,80,74,68,63,59,55,52,49,46,43,41,39,37,34,32,30,27,22];
  const tableLines = standings.map((t,i)=>{
    const pts = basePoints[i] + ri(-3,3);
    const w = Math.floor(pts/3 + ri(-2,2));
    const d = pts - w*3;
    const l = 38 - w - d;
    const mark = t === c.sportsTeam ? ' â†� YOU' : '';
    const qual = i===0 ? ' ðŸ�†' : (i<5 ? ' ðŸŒŸ' : (i===5 ? ' ðŸ¥ˆ' : (i===6 ? ' ðŸ¥‰' : (i>=17 ? ' â¬‡ï¸�' : ''))));
    return `${String(i+1).padStart(2,' ')}. ${t.padEnd(24,' ')} ${String(w).padStart(2,' ')}W ${String(d).padStart(2,' ')}D ${String(l).padStart(2,' ')}L  ${String(pts).padStart(2,' ')}pts${qual}${mark}`;
  }).join('\n');
  const champion = standings[0];
  let playerSummary;
  if(playerPos === 1){ playerSummary = `ðŸ�† ${c.sportsTeam} won the ${league}! Champions!`; c._euroComp = 'champions'; }
  else if(playerPos <= 5){ playerSummary = `ðŸŒŸ ${c.sportsTeam} finished ${ordinal(playerPos)} â€” qualified for the UEFA Champions League.`; c._euroComp = 'champions'; }
  else if(playerPos === 6){ playerSummary = `ðŸ¥ˆ ${c.sportsTeam} finished 6th â€” qualified for the UEFA Europa League.`; c._euroComp = 'europa'; }
  else if(playerPos === 7){ playerSummary = `ðŸ¥‰ ${c.sportsTeam} finished 7th â€” qualified for the UEFA Conference League.`; c._euroComp = 'conference'; }
  else if(playerPos >= 18){ playerSummary = `â¬‡ï¸� ${c.sportsTeam} finished ${ordinal(playerPos)} â€” relegation zone!`; c._euroComp = null; }
  else { playerSummary = `${c.sportsTeam} finished ${ordinal(playerPos)} â€” a mid-table season.`; c._euroComp = null; }

  // Small morale/happiness effect
  if(playerPos <= 5) c.happiness = clamp((c.happiness||75) + 8, 0, 100);
  else if(playerPos >= 18) c.happiness = clamp((c.happiness||75) - 8, 0, 100);

  const body = `ðŸ�† Champion: ${champion}\n\n${playerSummary}\n\nQualification:\nâ€¢ Top 5 â†’ UEFA Champions League\nâ€¢ 6th â†’ UEFA Europa League\nâ€¢ 7th â†’ UEFA Conference League\nâ€¢ 18th-20th â†’ Relegation\n\nFinal Table:\n${tableLines}`;
  const y = Math.floor(c.monthAge/12);
  addInboxItem({
    type:'news', icon:'ðŸ“Š',
    subject:`${league} â€” Final Standings (${champion} Champions)`,
    date:`Y${y}-Jun`,
    body,
  });
}

function ordinal(n){
  const s=['th','st','nd','rd'], v=n%100;
  return n + (s[(v-20)%10]||s[v]||s[0]);
}

// â”€â”€ European / International Club Competitions â”€â”€
// Pools include top-division clubs from Europe, North America, and South America so any
// qualified soccer player plays a continental-style tournament regardless of region.
