    'FC Cincinnati','DC United','Orlando City','New England Revolution',
    'Santos Laguna','Club Leon','Toluca','Club Tijuana',
    'Fluminense','Internacional','Velez Sarsfield','San Lorenzo',
  ],
};
const EURO_COMP_META = {
  champions: { label:'UEFA Champions League', short:'Champions League', icon:'ðŸ�†' },
  europa:    { label:'UEFA Europa League',    short:'Europa League',    icon:'ðŸ¥ˆ' },
  conference:{ label:'UEFA Conference League',short:'Conference League',icon:'ðŸ¥‰' },
};
const DEFAULT_EURO_COMP_TIER = {
  champions: new Set(['Manchester City','Liverpool','Arsenal','Manchester United','Real Madrid','Barcelona','Atletico Madrid','Inter Milan','AC Milan','Juventus','Napoli','Bayern Munich','Borussia Dortmund','RB Leipzig','Bayer Leverkusen','Paris Saint-Germain']),
  europa: new Set(['Chelsea','Tottenham','Newcastle United','Sevilla','AS Roma','Lazio','Atalanta','Eintracht Frankfurt','VfB Stuttgart','Olympique Marseille','Villarreal','Real Betis','AS Monaco','Lille OSC']),
  conference: new Set(['Aston Villa','West Ham','Brighton','Real Sociedad','Fiorentina','Bologna','OGC Nice','Athletic Bilbao','SC Freiburg','Hoffenheim']),
};
function initEuroCompForTeam(c){
  if(c.jobId !== 'soccer_player' || !c.sportsTeam) return;
  for(const [comp, teams] of Object.entries(DEFAULT_EURO_COMP_TIER)){
    if(teams.has(c.sportsTeam)){ c._euroComp = comp; return; }
  }
  c._euroComp = null;
}
function sendEuroCompFixtures(c){
  const comp = c._euroComp;
  if(!comp || !EURO_COMP_POOLS[comp]) return;
  const meta = EURO_COMP_META[comp];
  const opponents = EURO_COMP_POOLS[comp].filter(t => t !== c.sportsTeam);
  const picked = opponents.slice().sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5).slice(0,8);
  const ha = ['H','H','H','H','A','A','A','A'].sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5);
  const mds = ['Sep','Sep','Oct','Nov','Nov','Dec','Jan','Jan'];
  const lines = picked.map((opp,i) => {
    const side = ha[i];
    const v = side==='H' ? `${c.sportsTeam} vs ${opp}` : `${opp} vs ${c.sportsTeam}`;
    return `MD${i+1}  ${mds[i].padEnd(3,' ')}  ${side==='H'?'ðŸ� ':'âœˆï¸�'} ${v}`;
  }).join('\n');
  const y = Math.floor(c.monthAge/12);
  const body =
    `${meta.icon} ${meta.label} â€” League Phase\n\n`+
    `Your club: ${c.sportsTeam}\n`+
    `Format: 36 clubs Â· 8 matches each (4 home Â· 4 away)\n\n`+
    `Advancement:\nâ€¢ Top 8 â†’ straight to Round of 16\nâ€¢ 9thâ€“24th â†’ Knockout Playoff Round\nâ€¢ 25thâ€“36th â†’ eliminated\n\n`+
    `Your fixtures:\n${lines}\n\n`+
    `Knockout path (two-legged aggregate, except final):\n`+
    `â€¢ Round of 16 â€” Feb/Mar\nâ€¢ Quarterfinals â€” Apr\nâ€¢ Semifinals â€” May\nâ€¢ Final â€” single match, early June\n\n`+
    `Tied on aggregate? â†’ Extra time, then penalties. No away-goals rule.`;
  addInboxItem({
    type:'news', icon: meta.icon,
    subject: `${meta.short} â€” ${c.sportsTeam} league-phase fixtures`,
    date: `Y${y}-Aug`,
    body,
  });
}
function sendEuroCompResults(c){
  const comp = c._euroComp;
  if(!comp || !EURO_COMP_POOLS[comp]) return;
  const meta = EURO_COMP_META[comp];
  const pool = EURO_COMP_POOLS[comp].filter(t => t !== c.sportsTeam);
  const salaryFactor = Math.min(1, (c.salary||0) / 10000000);
  // League-phase finish position (1-36), salary-biased
  const r = Math.random();
  let leaguePos;
  if(salaryFactor > 0.5) leaguePos = r<0.5 ? ri(1,8) : r<0.85 ? ri(9,24) : ri(25,36);
  else if(salaryFactor > 0.2) leaguePos = r<0.3 ? ri(1,8) : r<0.75 ? ri(9,24) : ri(25,36);
  else leaguePos = r<0.15 ? ri(1,8) : r<0.6 ? ri(9,24) : ri(25,36);
  const path = [];
  path.push(`League phase: finished ${ordinal(leaguePos)} of 36`);
  let champion = null;
  let eliminatedAt = null;
  const shuffleOpp = () => pool[Math.floor(Math.random()*pool.length)];
  const aggScore = (win) => {
    const a = win ? ri(2,4) : ri(0,2);
    const b = win ? ri(0,2) : ri(2,4);
    if(a === b) return `${a}-${b} (${win?'won':'lost'} on penalties)`;
    return `${a}-${b} agg`;
  };
  if(leaguePos > 24){
    eliminatedAt = 'league phase';
  } else {
    if(leaguePos > 8){
      const kpOpp = shuffleOpp();
      const win = Math.random() < (0.45 + salaryFactor*0.2);
      path.push(`Knockout Playoff vs ${kpOpp} â€” ${aggScore(win)} ${win?'âœ…':'â�Œ'}`);
      if(!win) eliminatedAt = 'Knockout Playoff';
    } else {
      path.push(`Top 8 finish â†’ direct to Round of 16 âœ…`);
    }
    if(!eliminatedAt){
      const rounds = ['Round of 16','Quarterfinal','Semifinal','Final'];
      for(const round of rounds){
        const opp = shuffleOpp();
        const isFinal = round === 'Final';
        const baseWin = 0.5 + salaryFactor*0.15;
        const win = Math.random() < baseWin;
        const scoreTxt = isFinal
          ? (win ? `${ri(1,3)}-${ri(0,2)}` : `${ri(0,2)}-${ri(1,3)}`) + ' (single match)'
          : aggScore(win);
        path.push(`${round} vs ${opp} â€” ${scoreTxt} ${win?'âœ…':'â�Œ'}`);
        if(!win){ eliminatedAt = round; break; }
        if(isFinal){ champion = c.sportsTeam; break; }
      }
    }
  }
  if(!champion) champion = pool[Math.floor(Math.random()*pool.length)];
  const won = champion === c.sportsTeam;
  // Effects
  if(won){
    c.happiness = clamp((c.happiness||75) + 15, 0, 100);
    c.checking += Math.round((c.salary||0) * 0.15);
  } else if(eliminatedAt === 'league phase'){
    c.happiness = clamp((c.happiness||75) - 4, 0, 100);
  }
  const summary = won
    ? `ðŸ�† ${c.sportsTeam} WON the ${meta.label}! Continental champions!`
    : `Campaign ended in the ${eliminatedAt || 'final'}.`;
  const body =
    `${meta.icon} ${meta.label} â€” Campaign Summary\n\n`+
    `${summary}\n\n`+
    `ðŸ�† ${meta.short} Winner: ${champion}\n\n`+
    `Your path:\n${path.map((p,i)=>`${i+1}. ${p}`).join('\n')}\n\n`+
    (won ? `Prize: ${fmt$(Math.round((c.salary||0)*0.15))} bonus credited. +15 happiness.\n\n` : '') +
    `Next season's European qualification depends on your domestic league finish.`;
  const y = Math.floor(c.monthAge/12);
  addInboxItem({
    type:'news', icon: won ? 'ðŸ�†' : meta.icon,
    subject: won ? `${meta.short} CHAMPIONS â€” ${c.sportsTeam}!` : `${meta.short} â€” ${c.sportsTeam} campaign ended`,
    date: `Y${y}-Jun`,
    body,
  });
  c._euroComp = null;
}

function tickSoccerSeason(c){
  if(c.jobId !== 'soccer_player' || !c.sportsTeam) return;
  if(c._euroInit !== true){ initEuroCompForTeam(c); c._euroInit = true; }
  const monthInYear = c.monthAge % 12; // 0-indexed month position in life year
  // Proxy: monthInYear 7 = August (season start), monthInYear 5 = June (season end)
  if(monthInYear === 7){
    sendSoccerFixtures(c);
    if(c._euroComp) sendEuroCompFixtures(c);
  } else if(monthInYear === 5){
    if(c._euroComp) sendEuroCompResults(c); // must fire before standings so the slot is clear
    sendSoccerStandings(c);
  }
}

// â”€â”€ NFL Season: Schedule, Standings, Playoffs â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
const NFL_CONFERENCES = {
  AFC: {
    East: ['Buffalo Bills','Miami Dolphins','New England Patriots','New York Jets'],
    North: ['Baltimore Ravens','Cincinnati Bengals','Cleveland Browns','Pittsburgh Steelers'],
    South: ['Houston Texans','Indianapolis Colts','Jacksonville Jaguars','Tennessee Titans'],
    West: ['Denver Broncos','Kansas City Chiefs','Las Vegas Raiders','Los Angeles Chargers'],
  },
  NFC: {
    East: ['Dallas Cowboys','New York Giants','Philadelphia Eagles','Washington Commanders'],
    North: ['Chicago Bears','Detroit Lions','Green Bay Packers','Minnesota Vikings'],
    South: ['Atlanta Falcons','Carolina Panthers','New Orleans Saints','Tampa Bay Buccaneers'],
    West: ['Arizona Cardinals','Los Angeles Rams','San Francisco 49ers','Seattle Seahawks'],
  },
};
function flattenConf(conf){
  return Object.values(conf).flat();
}
function playerNFLConf(team){
  for(const [conf, divs] of Object.entries(NFL_CONFERENCES)){
    for(const list of Object.values(divs)){
      if(list.includes(team)) return conf;
    }
  }
  return null;
}
function sendNFLSchedule(c){
  const team = c.sportsTeam;
  if(!team) return;
  const conf = playerNFLConf(team) || 'AFC';
  const allTeams = [...flattenConf(NFL_CONFERENCES.AFC), ...flattenConf(NFL_CONFERENCES.NFC)].filter(t=>t!==team);
  const opps = allTeams.slice().sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5).slice(0,17);
  const months=['Sep','Sep','Sep','Sep','Oct','Oct','Oct','Oct','Nov','Nov','Nov','Nov','Dec','Dec','Dec','Jan','Jan'];
  const body = `NFL regular season schedule released. 17 games across 18 weeks.\n\nYour team: ${team} (${conf})\n\n` +
    opps.map((o,i)=>{
      const ha = i%2===0?'ðŸ� ':'âœˆï¸�';
      const m = months[Math.min(months.length-1,i)];
      return `Wk ${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}  ${m}  ${ha} ${ha==='ðŸ� '?team+' vs '+o : o+' vs '+team}`;
    }).join('\n') +
    `\n\nPlayoffs: top 7 per conference qualify. #1 seed gets a bye. Seeds 2-7 play Wild Card â†’ Divisional â†’ Conference Championship â†’ Super Bowl.`;
  const y = Math.floor(c.monthAge/12);
  addInboxItem({type:'news', icon:'ðŸ�ˆ', subject:`${team} â€” NFL schedule released`, date:`Y${y}-Sep`, body});
}
function sendNFLPlayoffs(c){
  const team = c.sportsTeam;
  if(!team) return;
  const conf = playerNFLConf(team) || 'AFC';
  const confTeams = flattenConf(NFL_CONFERENCES[conf]);
  const otherConf = conf==='AFC' ? 'NFC' : 'AFC';
  const otherTeams = flattenConf(NFL_CONFERENCES[otherConf]);
  const salaryFactor = Math.min(1, (c.salary||0)/20000000);
  const r = Math.random();
  let seed;
  if(salaryFactor > 0.5) seed = r<0.4?ri(1,3):r<0.75?ri(4,7):ri(8,16);
  else if(salaryFactor > 0.2) seed = r<0.25?ri(1,5):r<0.7?ri(6,11):ri(12,16);
  else seed = r<0.15?ri(1,7):r<0.6?ri(8,12):ri(13,16);
  const confShuf = confTeams.slice().sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5);
  const standings = [];
  let oi = 0;
  const others = confShuf.filter(t=>t!==team);
  for(let pos=1;pos<=16;pos++){
    if(pos===seed) standings.push(team);
    else standings.push(others[oi++]);
  }
  const playoffTeams = standings.slice(0,7);
  const otherPlayoffTeams = otherTeams.slice().sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5).slice(0,7);
  const tbl = standings.map((t,i)=>{
    const wins = Math.max(1, 14 - Math.floor(i*0.85) + ri(-1,1));
    const losses = 17 - wins;
    const mark = t===team?' â†� YOU':'';
    const qual = i===0?' ðŸ�† #1 seed (BYE)':(i<7?` ðŸŒŸ seed ${i+1} â€” playoff`:(i>=13?' â¬‡ï¸�':''));
    return `${String(i+1).padStart(2,' ')}. ${t.padEnd(24,' ')} ${String(wins).padStart(2,' ')}-${String(losses).padStart(2,' ')}${qual}${mark}`;
  }).join('\n');
  // Wild Card results: 2v7, 3v6, 4v5 per conference
  const wc = [[1,6],[2,5],[3,4]]; // indexes within seeds 2-7 (playoffTeams[1..6])
  const wcResults = wc.map(([a,b])=>{
    const ta=playoffTeams[a], tb=playoffTeams[b];
    const winA = Math.random() < 0.6;
    return winA?`${ta} def. ${tb}`:`${tb} def. ${ta}`;
  });
  let playerNote;
  if(seed===1) playerNote = `ðŸ�† ${team} finished ${seed===1?'#1':`#${seed}`} â€” FIRST-ROUND BYE. Advance straight to Divisional round.`;
  else if(seed<=7) playerNote = `ðŸŒŸ ${team} finished seed ${seed} â€” entering Wild Card round.`;
  else playerNote = `${team} finished seed ${seed} â€” missed the playoffs.`;
  const body = `ðŸ�ˆ ${conf} Playoff Picture\n\n${playerNote}\n\nWild Card Round (${conf}):\nâ€¢ ${wcResults.join('\nâ€¢ ')}\n\nFinal ${conf} Standings:\n${tbl}\n\n${otherConf} #1 seed: ${otherPlayoffTeams[0]} (BYE)\n${otherConf} playoff teams: ${otherPlayoffTeams.slice(0,7).join(', ')}`;
  const y = Math.floor(c.monthAge/12);
  addInboxItem({type:'news', icon:'ðŸ�ˆ', subject:`${conf} Playoffs â€” ${team} seed ${seed>7?'â€”':`#${seed}`}`, date:`Y${y}-Jan`, body});
  c._nflPlayoffSeed = seed;
  c._nflConf = conf;
  c._nflOtherConfChamp = otherPlayoffTeams[ri(0,3)];
}
function sendNFLSuperBowl(c){
  const team = c.sportsTeam;
  if(!team) return;
  const seed = c._nflPlayoffSeed || 16;
  const conf = c._nflConf || 'AFC';
  const otherConfChamp = c._nflOtherConfChamp || 'Kansas City Chiefs';
  const inPlayoffs = seed <= 7;
  const playerTeamChance = Math.max(0.02, (8-seed)/9 * (seed<=7?1:0));
  const playerWinsConf = inPlayoffs && Math.random() < playerTeamChance;
  let outcome;
  const salaryFactor = Math.min(1, (c.salary||0)/20000000);
  if(playerWinsConf){
    const sbWin = Math.random() < (0.35 + salaryFactor*0.25);
    if(sbWin){
      outcome = `ðŸ�† SUPER BOWL CHAMPIONS! ${team} defeats ${otherConfChamp}.\nConfetti. Parade. Ring ceremony.`;
      c.happiness = clamp((c.happiness||75)+15,0,100);
      c.checking += Math.round((c.salary||0)*0.15);
      logEvent(`Super Bowl Champion with ${team}!`, 'gold');
    } else {
      outcome = `ðŸ¥ˆ ${team} lost the Super Bowl to ${otherConfChamp}. Heartbreak.`;
      c.happiness = clamp((c.happiness||75)-5,0,100);
    }
  } else if(inPlayoffs){
    const rounds = ['Wild Card','Divisional','Conference Championship'];
    const exitRound = pick(rounds);
    outcome = `${team} exited in the ${exitRound} round.\n\nSuper Bowl: ${otherConfChamp} wins it all.`;
  } else {
    const afcChamp = otherConfChamp;
    const nfcChamp = pick(flattenConf(NFL_CONFERENCES[conf==='AFC'?'NFC':'AFC']));
    outcome = `${team} missed the playoffs this year.\n\nSuper Bowl: ${afcChamp} defeats ${nfcChamp}.`;
  }
  const body = `ðŸ�† Super Bowl Results\n\n${outcome}\n\nOff-season begins. Roster moves ahead.`;
  const y = Math.floor(c.monthAge/12);
  addInboxItem({type:'news', icon:'ðŸ�†', subject:`Super Bowl â€” ${playerWinsConf?'VICTORY':'Results'}`, date:`Y${y}-Feb`, body});
}
function tickNFLSeason(c){
  if(c.jobId !== 'football_player' || !c.sportsTeam) return;
  const m = c.monthAge % 12; // 0=Jan â€¦ 8=Sep
  if(m === 8) sendNFLSchedule(c);       // September: schedule
  else if(m === 0) sendNFLPlayoffs(c);  // January: playoffs/standings
  else if(m === 1) sendNFLSuperBowl(c); // February: Super Bowl
}

// â”€â”€ NHL Season: Schedule, Standings, Play-in, Playoffs â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
const NHL_CONFERENCES = {
  Eastern: ['Toronto Maple Leafs','Montreal Canadiens','New York Rangers','Boston Bruins','Buffalo Sabres','Ottawa Senators','Detroit Red Wings','Florida Panthers','Tampa Bay Lightning','Carolina Hurricanes','Washington Capitals','Philadelphia Flyers','Pittsburgh Penguins','New Jersey Devils','New York Islanders','Columbus Blue Jackets'],
  Western: ['Chicago Blackhawks','Minnesota Wild','Colorado Avalanche','Dallas Stars','Nashville Predators','Winnipeg Jets','St. Louis Blues','Vancouver Canucks','Edmonton Oilers','Calgary Flames','Los Angeles Kings','Anaheim Ducks','San Jose Sharks','Vegas Golden Knights','Arizona Coyotes','Seattle Kraken'],
};
function playerNHLConf(team){
  for(const [conf, list] of Object.entries(NHL_CONFERENCES)){
    if(list.includes(team)) return conf;
  }
  return null;
}
function sendNHLSchedule(c){
  const team = c.sportsTeam;
  if(!team) return;
  const conf = playerNHLConf(team) || 'Eastern';
  const all = [...NHL_CONFERENCES.Eastern, ...NHL_CONFERENCES.Western].filter(t=>t!==team);
  // Full NHL season = 82 games. Show a condensed preview of 20.
  const opps = [];
  while(opps.length < 20){
    opps.push(all[Math.floor(Math.random()*all.length)]);
  }
  const months=['Oct','Oct','Nov','Nov','Dec','Dec','Jan','Jan','Feb','Feb','Feb','Mar','Mar','Mar','Apr','Apr','Apr','Apr','Apr','Apr'];
  const body = `NHL regular season schedule released. 82 games.\n\nYour team: ${team} (${conf} Conference)\n\nPreview (first 20 matchdays):\n` +
    opps.map((o,i)=>{
      const ha = i%2===0?'ðŸ� ':'âœˆï¸�';
      return `G${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}  ${months[i]}  ${ha} ${ha==='ðŸ� '?team+' vs '+o : o+' vs '+team}`;
    }).join('\n') +
    `\n\nPlayoffs: top 6 per conference auto-qualify. Seeds 7-10 enter a play-in tournament (7v10, 8v9, best-of-3) â€” winners take seeds 7 & 8 in the main bracket.\nMain playoffs: best-of-7 series across 4 rounds â†’ Stanley Cup Final.`;
  const y = Math.floor(c.monthAge/12);
  addInboxItem({type:'news', icon:'ðŸ�’', subject:`${team} â€” NHL schedule released`, date:`Y${y}-Oct`, body});
}
function sendNHLPlayins(c){
  const team = c.sportsTeam;
  if(!team) return;
  const conf = playerNHLConf(team) || 'Eastern';
  const confTeams = NHL_CONFERENCES[conf];
  const salaryFactor = Math.min(1, (c.salary||0)/10000000);
  const r = Math.random();
  let seed;
  if(salaryFactor > 0.5) seed = r<0.35?ri(1,4):r<0.7?ri(5,10):ri(11,16);
  else if(salaryFactor > 0.2) seed = r<0.25?ri(1,6):r<0.7?ri(7,12):ri(13,16);
  else seed = r<0.2?ri(1,8):r<0.6?ri(9,13):ri(14,16);
  const others = confTeams.filter(t=>t!==team).sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5);
  const standings = [];
  let oi = 0;
  for(let pos=1;pos<=16;pos++){
    if(pos===seed) standings.push(team);
    else standings.push(others[oi++]);
  }
  const tbl = standings.map((t,i)=>{
    const pts = Math.max(55, 115 - i*4 + ri(-3,3));
    const wins = Math.floor(pts/2.4);
    const losses = 82 - wins - ri(3,10);
    const ot = 82 - wins - losses;
    const mark = t===team?' â†� YOU':'';
    const qual = i<6 ? ' ðŸŒŸ auto playoff' : (i<10 ? ' ðŸŽŸï¸� play-in' : (i>=14?' â¬‡ï¸�':''));
    return `${String(i+1).padStart(2,' ')}. ${t.padEnd(22,' ')} ${String(wins).padStart(2,' ')}-${String(losses).padStart(2,' ')}-${String(ot).padStart(1,' ')}  ${String(pts).padStart(3,' ')}pts${qual}${mark}`;
  }).join('\n');
  // Play-in bracket: seeds 7v10 and 8v9
  const s7=standings[6], s10=standings[9], s8=standings[7], s9=standings[8];
  const winA = Math.random()<0.55 ? s7 : s10;
  const winB = Math.random()<0.55 ? s8 : s9;
  let playerNote;
  if(seed===1) playerNote = `ðŸ¥‡ ${team} finished 1st in ${conf} â€” clinched division, top seed.`;
  else if(seed<=6) playerNote = `ðŸŒŸ ${team} finished ${ordinal(seed)} â€” automatic playoff berth.`;
  else if(seed<=10) playerNote = `ðŸŽŸï¸� ${team} finished ${ordinal(seed)} â€” entering the play-in tournament.`;
  else playerNote = `${team} finished ${ordinal(seed)} â€” missed the postseason.`;
  const body = `ðŸ�’ ${conf} Conference â€” Regular Season Recap\n\n${playerNote}\n\nPlay-in Results (best-of-3):\nâ€¢ ${s7} vs ${s10} â€” winner: ${winA}\nâ€¢ ${s8} vs ${s9} â€” winner: ${winB}\n\n${winA} and ${winB} now fill seeds 7 & 8 in the main playoff bracket.\n\nFinal ${conf} Standings:\n${tbl}`;
  const y = Math.floor(c.monthAge/12);
  addInboxItem({type:'news', icon:'ðŸ�’', subject:`${conf} â€” standings + play-in (${team} ${ordinal(seed)})`, date:`Y${y}-Apr`, body});
  c._nhlSeed = seed;
  c._nhlConf = conf;
}
function sendNHLStanleyCup(c){
  const team = c.sportsTeam;
  if(!team) return;
  const seed = c._nhlSeed || 16;
  const conf = c._nhlConf || 'Eastern';
  const otherConf = conf==='Eastern'?'Western':'Eastern';
  const otherChamp = pick(NHL_CONFERENCES[otherConf]);
  const inPlayoffs = seed <= 10; // 1-6 auto, 7-10 via play-in
  const salaryFactor = Math.min(1, (c.salary||0)/10000000);
  let outcome;
  if(inPlayoffs){
    const advChance = seed<=4?0.55:seed<=6?0.4:seed<=8?0.25:0.12;
    const wonConf = Math.random() < advChance;
    if(wonConf){
      const cupWin = Math.random() < (0.4 + salaryFactor*0.2);
      if(cupWin){
        outcome = `ðŸ�† STANLEY CUP CHAMPIONS! ${team} defeats ${otherChamp} in the Finals.\nLord Stanley's Cup is yours. Name engraved.`;
        c.happiness = clamp((c.happiness||75)+18,0,100);
        c.checking += Math.round((c.salary||0)*0.20);
        logEvent(`Stanley Cup Champion with ${team}!`, 'gold');
      } else {
        outcome = `ðŸ¥ˆ ${team} lost the Stanley Cup Final to ${otherChamp}. Gut-wrenching.`;
        c.happiness = clamp((c.happiness||75)-5,0,100);
      }
    } else {
      const rounds = ['First Round','Second Round','Conference Final'];
      const exitRound = pick(rounds);
      outcome = `${team} was eliminated in the ${exitRound}.\n\nStanley Cup: ${otherChamp} defeats a ${conf} rival.`;
    }
  } else {
    const eastC = pick(NHL_CONFERENCES.Eastern);
    const westC = pick(NHL_CONFERENCES.Western);
    outcome = `${team} missed the playoffs this year.\n\nStanley Cup: ${eastC} vs ${westC} â€” champion: ${pick([eastC,westC])}.`;
  }
  const body = `ðŸ�† Stanley Cup Final â€” Results\n\n${outcome}\n\nDraft and free agency ahead.`;
  const y = Math.floor(c.monthAge/12);
  addInboxItem({type:'news', icon:'ðŸ�†', subject:`Stanley Cup â€” ${inPlayoffs?'Results':'Recap'}`, date:`Y${y}-Jun`, body});
}
function tickNHLSeason(c){
  if(c.jobId !== 'hockey_player' || !c.sportsTeam) return;
  const m = c.monthAge % 12;
  if(m === 9) sendNHLSchedule(c);        // October
  else if(m === 3) sendNHLPlayins(c);    // April â€” standings + play-in
  else if(m === 5) sendNHLStanleyCup(c); // June â€” Stanley Cup
}

function signSportsContract(item){
  const c = GS.char;
  if(!item || !item.offer) return 'Invalid offer.';
  if(c.jobSector !== 'sports'){ return 'You\'re no longer a pro athlete.'; }
  const o = item.offer;
  c.salary = o.newSalary;
  c.sportsTeam = o.teamName;
  // Reset jobTitle to the base role (strip any prior team), then append new team
  const baseRole = (c.jobTitle||'').split(' @ ')[0];
  c.jobTitle = `${baseRole} @ ${o.teamName}`;
  c.checking += o.signingBonus;
  item.signed = true;
  item.body += `\n\nâœ… Signed. New salary applied: ${fmt$(o.newSalary)}/yr. Signing bonus ${fmt$(o.signingBonus)} credited.`;
  showToast(`Signed with ${o.teamName}! +${fmt$(o.signingBonus)} bonus`);
  logEvent(`Signed with ${o.teamName} â€” new salary ${fmt$(o.newSalary)}/yr`, 'gold');
  return `Signed with ${o.teamName}! Salary now ${fmt$(o.newSalary)}/yr. Signing bonus of ${fmt$(o.signingBonus)} deposited.`;
}

function tickSponsors(inv, char){
  if(!inv.sponsors || !inv.sponsors.length) return;
  const remaining=[];
  for(const s of inv.sponsors){
    char.checking += s.monthly;
    s.monthsLeft--;
    if(s.monthsLeft <= 0){
      addInboxItem({
        type:'news', icon:s.icon,
        subject:`Sponsorship ended â€” ${s.name}`,
        date: currentMonthDate(char),
        body:`Your deal with ${s.name} has run its course.\n\nTotal monthly payments over the term added up over time. You can re-sign if they're still available in the Sponsors tab.`
      });
    } else {
      remaining.push(s);
    }
  }
  inv.sponsors = remaining;
}

function stockPortfolioValue(inv){
  return Object.entries(inv.portfolio).reduce((s,[id,pos])=>{
    const st=inv.stocks.find(x=>x.id===id);return s+(st?st.price*pos.shares:0);},0);
}
function cryptoPortfolioValue(inv){
  return Object.entries(inv.cryptoHeld).reduce((s,[id,pos])=>{
    const c=inv.cryptos.find(x=>x.id===id);return s+(c?c.price*pos.coins:0);},0);
}
function totalRetirement(inv){return inv.k401+inv.ira+inv.roth;}
function totalPropertyValue(inv){return inv.properties.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.value,0);}
function totalPropertyEquity(inv){return inv.properties.reduce((s,p)=>s+(p.value-p.debt),0);}
function totalBizValue(inv){return inv.businesses.reduce((s,b)=>s+b.value,0);}

function calcNetWorth(char, inv){
  const liquid=char.checking+char.savings+char.highYield;
  const invested=stockPortfolioValue(inv)+cryptoPortfolioValue(inv)+totalRetirement(inv)+totalPropertyEquity(inv)+totalBizValue(inv)+totalVehicleValue(inv);
  const debt=char.debt+(inv.properties.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.debt,0));
  return liquid+invested-debt;
}

Portfolio down ~${fmt$(loss)}. Holding.`}return'False alarm. Still invested.'}},

function selectEvents(char){
  const rw={opportunity:60,disaster:40,milestone:50,flavor:30};
  const elig=EVENTS_POOL.filter(e=>{try{return e.cond(char)}catch{return false}});
  if(!elig.length)return[];
  const pool=elig.map(e=>({e,w:rw[e.cat]||20}));
  const total=pool.reduce((s,x)=>s+x.w,0);
  const count=ri(1,3); const sel=[]; const used=new Set();
  for(let i=0;i<count;i++){
    const rem=pool.filter(x=>!used.has(x.e.id));
    if(!rem.length)break;
    let r=Math.random()*rem.reduce((s,x)=>s+x.w,0);
    for(const{e,w}of rem){r-=w;if(r<=0){sel.push(e);used.add(e.id);break;}}
  }
  return sel;
}

let _lastTipIndex = -1;

function generateTipEvent(){
  let idx;
  do { idx = ri(0, FINANCIAL_TIPS.length-1); } while(idx === _lastTipIndex);
  _lastTipIndex = idx;
  const t = FINANCIAL_TIPS[idx];
  return {
    id:'financial_tip',
    title:'Financial Tip',
    cat:'tip',
    icon:'ðŸ’¡',
    desc: t.tip,
    choices:[{text:'Got it, thanks!', fn(c){ return ''; }}],
  };
}

// â”€â”€ Pending Expense Tick â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
function tickPendingExpenses(char, ev){
  if(!char.pendingExpenses) char.pendingExpenses=[];
  const stillPending=[];
  for(const exp of char.pendingExpenses){
    exp.monthsLeft--;
    if(exp.monthsLeft<=0){
      // Time's up â€” force-pay regardless of balance
      const hadFunds = char.checking >= exp.cost;
      char.checking -= exp.cost;
      // Credit score hit: -15 to -25, worse if it pushed balance negative
      const scoreDrop = hadFunds ? ri(15,25) : ri(30,50);
      char.creditScore = clamp(char.creditScore - scoreDrop, 300, 850);
      const balanceNote = !hadFunds ? ` Account went negative!` : '';
      if(!char.belongings) char.belongings=[];
      char.belongings.push({id:`b_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7)}`, name:exp.name, icon:exp.icon, cost:exp.cost, purchasedAt:char.monthAge});
      ev.push({type:'bad', text:`âš ï¸� Forced payment: ${exp.icon} ${exp.name} â€” ${fmt$(exp.cost)} auto-deducted. Credit score -${scoreDrop}.${balanceNote}`});
    } else {
      stillPending.push(exp);
    }
  }
  char.pendingExpenses = stillPending;
}

// â”€â”€ Monthly Expense Generator â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
function generateMonthlyExpenseEvent(char){
  if(char.age < 16) return null;
  // Pick 4 distinct items, each with its own rolled cost
  const pool = MONTHLY_EXPENSES.slice();
  const picks = [];
  const count = Math.min(4, pool.length);
  for(let i=0; i<count; i++){
    const idx = ri(0, pool.length-1);
    const item = pool.splice(idx, 1)[0];
    picks.push({item, cost: ri(item.min, item.max)});
  }
  const descLines = picks.map(p => `${p.item.icon} ${p.item.name} â€” ${fmt$(p.cost)}`).join('  Â·  ');
  const choices = [];
  for(const p of picks){
    choices.push({
      text:`Buy ${p.item.icon} ${p.item.name} â€” ${fmt$(p.cost)}`,
      fn(c){
        c.checking -= p.cost;
        const bump = ri(1,3);
        c.creditScore = clamp(c.creditScore + bump, 300, 850);
        if(!c.belongings) c.belongings=[];
        c.belongings.push({id:`b_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7)}`, name:p.item.name, icon:p.item.icon, cost:p.cost, purchasedAt:c.monthAge});
        return `Paid ${fmt$(p.cost)} for ${p.item.name}. Added to belongings â€” sell anytime from Assets tab. Credit score +${bump}.`;
      }
    });
  }
  for(const p of picks){
    choices.push({
      text:`Defer ${p.item.icon} ${p.item.name} â€” ${fmt$(p.cost)} (10 mo)`,
      fn(c){
        if(!c.pendingExpenses) c.pendingExpenses=[];
        c.pendingExpenses.push({name:p.item.name, icon:p.item.icon, cost:p.cost, monthsLeft:10});
        return `Deferred ${p.item.name}. ${fmt$(p.cost)} due in 10 months. Miss it and your credit takes a hit.`;
      }
    });
  }
  choices.push({
    text:`Pass â€” none of these`,
    fn(){ return `Skipped this month's offers. Maybe next time.`; }
  });
  return {
    id: 'monthly_expense_'+Date.now(),
    title: 'Monthly Shopping Offers',
    cat: 'expense',
    icon: picks[0].item.icon,
    desc: `Four items caught your eye this month. Pick one to buy, defer the cost up to 10 months, or pass entirely.\n\n${descLines}`,
    choices,
  };
}

function annualTick(){ monthlyTick(); } // alias kept for compatibility

function monthlyTick(){
  const c=GS.char, inv=GS.inv;
  const ev=[];

  c.monthAge++;
  const prevAge = c.age;
  c.age = Math.floor(c.monthAge / 12);
  const isNewYear = c.age > prevAge; // a full year just completed

  // Auto high school at 14
  if(c.age===14&&isNewYear&&c.education==='none'&&!c.inSchool){
    c.inSchool=true;c.schoolType='high_school';c.schoolMonthsLeft=48;c.schoolCostMonthly=0;
    ev.push({type:'info',text:'Started high school.'});
  }

  // School progress (monthly)
  tickSchool(c, ev);

  // Auto seek job
  if(!c.inSchool&&!c.employed&&!c.retired&&c.age>=16&&pct(0.065)){
    const avail=getAvailableJobs(c);
    if(avail.length){const j=avail[ri(0,Math.min(2,avail.length-1))];applyForJob(c,j);ev.push({type:'good',text:`Got job: ${c.jobTitle} â€” ${fmt$(c.salary)}/yr`});}
  }

  // Monthly markets: prices update every month
  tickStocks(inv);
  tickCrypto(inv);
  tickVehicles(inv);

  // Annual systems: fire once per year
  if(isNewYear){
    tickCareerNew(c, ev);
    tickRelationship(c, ev);
    tickMarket(inv);
    tickRetirement(inv, c);
    tickRealEstate(inv, ev);
    tickBusinesses(inv, c, ev);
    if(c.age>40) c.health=clamp(c.health-rf(0.5,1.5),0,100);
  }

  // Tick deferred expenses (auto-pay overdue ones)
  tickPendingExpenses(c, ev);

  // Monthly sponsor payments + term tracking
  tickSponsors(inv, c);

  // Sports team contract offers (monthly chance for athletes)
  tickSportsOffers(c);

  // Soccer season events (fixtures in Aug, standings in Jun)
  tickSoccerSeason(c);
  // NFL season: Sep schedule, Jan playoffs, Feb Super Bowl
  tickNFLSeason(c);
  // NHL season: Oct schedule, Apr play-in, Jun Stanley Cup
  tickNHLSeason(c);

  // Monthly finances
  const fin=tickFinances(c, ev);

  // Happiness drifts slowly each month
  c.happiness=clamp(Math.round(c.happiness+(55-c.happiness)*0.004),0,100);

  // Net worth
  const prevNW = GS.nwHistory.length?GS.nwHistory[GS.nwHistory.length-1]:0;
  const nw=calcNetWorth(c,inv);
  GS.nwHistory.push(nw);

  // Log background events
  for(const e of ev) logEvent(e.text, e.type||'info');

  // Death check (monthly probability)
  if(tickDeath(c)){
    setTimeout(()=>showGameOver(),500);
    return;
  }

  // Build event queue: monthly expense first, then life event, then occasional tip
  GS.pendingEvents=[];
  const expEvent = generateMonthlyExpenseEvent(c);
  if(expEvent) GS.pendingEvents.push(expEvent);
  if(pct(0.30)){
    const events=selectEvents(c);
    if(events.length) GS.pendingEvents.push(events[0]);
  }
  // Financial tip: roughly every 4-5 months
  if(pct(0.22)) GS.pendingEvents.push(generateTipEvent());

  // Inbox: monthly news + bills
  generateInboxItems(c, inv);

  // Downside event: 3% monthly chance
  if(pct(0.03)) triggerDownside(c);

  // Bank update message: ~9% monthly chance (about 1/year per bank feature)
  maybeEmitBankUpdate(c);

  // Employee check-ins: monthly morale drift + inbox messages from staff
  tickEmployeeMessages(c, inv);

  updateUI(fin, prevNW, nw);
  saveGame();

  if(GS.pendingEvents.length>0) showNextEvent();
}

function $(id){return document.getElementById(id)}
function setText(id,v){const el=$(id);if(el)el.textContent=v}

function updateUI(fin, prevNW, nw){
  const c=GS.char, inv=GS.inv;

  // Sponsors button: always visible next to Education, disabled until $500k biz value
  const spBtn = $('btn-sponsors');
  if(spBtn){
    const unlocked = sponsorsUnlocked(inv);
    spBtn.disabled = !unlocked;
    spBtn.title = unlocked ? 'Browse sponsorship deals' : 'Unlocks at $500k total business value';
    if(unlocked && (inv.sponsors||[]).length){
      spBtn.innerHTML = `<span class="aico">ðŸ¤�</span>Sponsors (${inv.sponsors.length})`;
    } else if(unlocked){
      spBtn.innerHTML = `<span class="aico">ðŸ¤�</span>Sponsors`;
    } else {
      spBtn.innerHTML = `<span class="aico">ðŸ”’</span>Sponsors`;
    }
  }

  // Stats bar
  setText('char-name',c.name);
  setText('char-age-job',`Age ${ageDisplay(c)}${c.employed?` Â· ${c.jobTitle}`:c.inSchool?' Â· Student':' Â· Unemployed'}`);
  $('bar-health').style.width=c.health+'%';$('val-health').textContent=Math.round(c.health);
  $('bar-happy').style.width=c.happiness+'%';$('val-happy').textContent=Math.round(c.happiness);
  $('bar-smarts').style.width=c.smarts+'%';$('val-smarts').textContent=Math.round(c.smarts);

  const nwEl=$('nw-value'); nwEl.textContent=fmt$(nw);
  nwEl.className='pos '+(nw>=0?'pos':'neg');
  const delta=nw-prevNW;
  const dEl=$('nw-delta'); dEl.textContent=(delta>=0?'+':'')+fmt$(delta)+' this year';
  dEl.className=delta>=0?'pos':'neg';

  // Life tab
  setText('li-name',c.name); setText('li-age',ageDisplay(c));
  setText('li-edu',EDU_LABELS[c.education]||(c.inSchool?`Studying ${EDU_LABELS[c.schoolType]||''}`:'-'));
  const relLabels={single:'Single',dating:`Dating ${c.spouseName||''}`,married:`Married to ${c.spouseName||''}`,divorced:'Divorced',widowed:'Widowed'};
  setText('li-rel',relLabels[c.relationship]||c.relationship);
  setText('li-kids',c.kids);
  setText('li-job',c.inSchool?'In School':c.employed?c.jobTitle:'Unemployed');
  setText('li-salary',c.employed?fmt$(c.salary)+'/yr':'$0/yr');
  setText('li-side',fmt$(c.sideHustleIncome||0)+'/yr');
  setText('li-total-inc',fmt$((c.employed?c.salary:0)+(c.sideHustleIncome||0))+'/yr');
  setText('li-yrs',c.yearsAtJob||0);
  const perfLabels=['','','Struggling','Fair','Good','Very Good','Excellent','Outstanding'];
  setText('li-perf',perfLabels[Math.round(c.performance/14)]||'Good');
  if(c.employed){
    const m=c.bossMorale||c.performance||50;
    let tag='Safe';
    if(m>=75) tag='Likely Raise';
    else if(m<=30) tag='At Risk';
    else if(m<=50) tag='Cautious';
    setText('li-morale',`${Math.round(m)}% Â· ${tag}`);
  } else setText('li-morale','â€”');

  // Finances tab
  setText('fi-check',fmt$(c.checking));
  setText('fi-save',fmt$(c.savings));
  setText('fi-hy',fmt$(c.highYield));
  setText('fi-liq',fmt$(c.checking+c.savings+c.highYield));
  if(fin){
    setText('cf-gross',fmt$(fin.gross));
    setText('cf-tax','-'+fmt$(fin.taxes));
    setText('cf-exp','-'+fmt$(fin.livingCost));
    setText('cf-debt','-'+fmt$(fin.debtPay));
    const netEl=$('cf-net'); netEl.textContent=fmt$(fin.annSavings); netEl.className='ir-value '+(fin.annSavings>=0?'pos':'neg');
    const gross=fin.gross||1; const savePct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,((fin.annSavings/gross)*100)));
    $('cf-bar').style.width=savePct+'%';
    $('cf-bar').className='cf-fill '+(fin.annSavings>=0?'pos':'neg');
  }
  setText('d-student',fmt$(c.studentDebt||0));
  setText('d-cc',fmt$(c.creditCards||0));
  setText('d-loans',fmt$(Math.max(0,c.debt-(c.studentDebt||0)-(c.creditCards||0))));
  setText('d-total',fmt$(c.debt));
  // Deferred expenses
  const defEl=$('d-deferred');
  if(defEl){
    const pending=c.pendingExpenses||[];
    if(!pending.length){defEl.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:11px">No deferred expenses.</p>';}
    else{defEl.innerHTML=pending.map(e=>`<div class="info-row"><span class="ir-label">${e.icon} ${e.name}</span><span class="ir-value neg">${fmt$(e.cost)} <span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:10px">(${e.monthsLeft}mo left)</span></span></div>`).join('');}
  }
  drawCreditDial(c.creditScore);

  // Invest tab
  const stVal=stockPortfolioValue(inv); const crVal=cryptoPortfolioValue(inv);
  const retVal=totalRetirement(inv);
  setText('pf-stocks',fmt$(stVal));
  setText('pf-etfs','$0'); // merged into stocks
  setText('pf-crypto',fmt$(crVal));
  setText('pf-retire',fmt$(retVal));
  setText('pf-total',fmt$(stVal+crVal+retVal));
  $('mkt-badge').textContent='Â· Market: '+inv.climate.toUpperCase();
  renderStocksTable(inv);
  renderCryptoGrid(inv);
  setText('ret-401k',fmt$(inv.k401));
  setText('ret-ira',fmt$(inv.ira));
  setText('ret-roth',fmt$(inv.roth));
  $('ret-bar').style.width=Math.min(100,(retVal/1000000)*100)+'%';

  // Assets tab
  const liquid=c.checking+c.savings+c.highYield;
  const investTotal=stVal+crVal+retVal;
  const reEq=totalPropertyEquity(inv); const bizVal=totalBizValue(inv);
  const totalAssets=liquid+investTotal+reEq+bizVal;
  const totalDebt=c.debt+inv.properties.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.debt,0);
  setText('as-liquid',fmt$(liquid)); setText('as-invest',fmt$(investTotal));
  setText('as-re-eq',fmt$(reEq)); setText('as-biz',fmt$(bizVal));
  setText('as-assets',fmt$(totalAssets)); setText('as-liab',fmt$(totalDebt));
  setText('as-nw',fmt$(nw));
  renderProperties(inv); renderBusinesses(inv); renderBelongings(c);
  renderBusinessTab();

  drawNetWorthChart();
  renderInbox();
}

function resaleValue(item, c){
  const ageMonths = Math.max(0, (c.monthAge||0) - (item.purchasedAt||0));
  // First month: 70% resale; drop 3% per month; floor at 15% of cost
  const factor = Math.max(0.15, 0.70 - ageMonths*0.03);
  return Math.max(1, Math.round(item.cost * factor));
}

function renderBelongings(c){
  const el=$('belongings-list'); if(!el) return;
  const items=c.belongings||[];
  if(!items.length){
    el.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">Nothing to sell. Monthly expense items you buy will show up here.</p>';
    return;
  }
  el.innerHTML = items.map((b,i)=>{
    const resale = resaleValue(b, c);
    const ageM = Math.max(0, (c.monthAge||0) - (b.purchasedAt||0));
    return `<div class="info-row" style="align-items:center">
      <span class="ir-label">${b.icon} ${b.name} <span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:10px">Â· ${ageM}mo old Â· paid ${fmt$(b.cost)}</span></span>
      <span style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">
        <span class="ir-value pos">${fmt$(resale)}</span>
        <button class="choice-btn" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:11px;margin:0" onclick="sellBelonging('${b.id}')">Sell</button>
      </span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function sellBelonging(id){
  const c=GS.char; if(!c||!c.belongings) return;
  const idx=c.belongings.findIndex(b=>b.id===id); if(idx<0) return;
  const item=c.belongings[idx];
  const resale=resaleValue(item, c);
  c.checking += resale;
  c.belongings.splice(idx,1);
  logEvent(`Sold ${item.icon} ${item.name} for ${fmt$(resale)} (paid ${fmt$(item.cost)}).`, 'info');
  showToast(`Sold ${item.name} for ${fmt$(resale)}`);
  saveGame();
  renderBelongings(c);
  setText('fi-check',fmt$(c.checking));
}

function renderStocksTable(inv){
  const held=Object.entries(inv.portfolio);
  if(!held.length){$('stocks-table-wrap').innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">No stocks owned.</p>';return;}
  let h='<table class="stock-table"><thead><tr><th>Ticker</th><th>Shares</th><th>Price</th><th>Change</th><th>Value</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
  for(const[id,pos]of held){
    const s=inv.stocks.find(x=>x.id===id);if(!s)continue;
    const hist=s.history;const prev=hist.length>1?hist[hist.length-2]:s.price;
    const chg=((s.price-prev)/prev*100).toFixed(1);
    const val=s.price*pos.shares;
    const cls=parseFloat(chg)>=0?'chg-pos':'chg-neg';
    h+=`<tr><td>${id}</td><td>${pos.shares}</td><td>$${s.price.toFixed(2)}</td><td class="${cls}">${parseFloat(chg)>=0?'+':''}${chg}%</td><td>${fmt$(val)}</td></tr>`;
  }
  $('stocks-table-wrap').innerHTML=h+'</tbody></table>';
}

function renderCryptoGrid(inv){
  const held=Object.entries(inv.cryptoHeld);
  if(!held.length){$('crypto-grid').innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;grid-column:1/-1">No crypto owned.</p>';return;}
  let h='';
  for(const[id,pos]of held){
    const c=inv.cryptos.find(x=>x.id===id);if(!c)continue;
    const val=c.price*pos.coins;
    h+=`<div class="crypto-card"><div class="cc-name">${c.name}</div><div class="cc-price">${fmt$(val)}</div><div class="cc-hold">${pos.coins.toFixed(4)} coins @ $${c.price.toFixed(2)}</div></div>`;
  }
  $('crypto-grid').innerHTML=h;
}

function renderProperties(inv){
  if(!inv.properties.length){$('prop-list').innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">No properties owned.</p>';return;}
  $('prop-list').innerHTML=inv.properties.map(p=>{
    const tag=p.livedIn?' ðŸ�¡':p.rented?' ðŸ’°':'';
    return `<div class="info-row"><span class="ir-label">${p.name}${tag}</span><span class="ir-value pos">${fmt$(p.value-p.debt)} equity</span></div>`;
  }).join('');
}
function renderBusinesses(inv){
  if(!inv.businesses.length){$('biz-list').innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">No businesses owned.</p>';return;}
  $('biz-list').innerHTML=inv.businesses.map(b=>{
    const emp=(b.employees||[]).length;
    const empNote=emp>0?` Â· ðŸ‘¥ ${emp}`:'';
    return `<div class="info-row"><span class="ir-label">${b.name}${empNote}</span><span class="ir-value ${b.profit>=0?'pos':'neg'}">${fmt$(b.value)} value</span></div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function drawCreditDial(score){
  const canvas=$('credit-canvas'); if(!canvas)return;
  const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
  const W=canvas.width,H=canvas.height;
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  const cx=W/2,cy=H-10,r=H-20;
  // Background arc
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,Math.PI,0);ctx.strokeStyle='#2e4a2e';ctx.lineWidth=12;ctx.stroke();
  // Score arc
  const pct=(score-300)/550;
  const col=score>=750?'#00c853':score>=670?'#ffd700':score>=580?'#ffa726':'#ff3d3d';
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,Math.PI,Math.PI+(pct*Math.PI));ctx.strokeStyle=col;ctx.lineWidth=12;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.stroke();
  // Score label
  const el=$('cs-score'); if(el){el.textContent=score;el.style.color=col;}
  const gradeEl=$('cs-grade'); if(gradeEl){
    gradeEl.textContent=score>=800?'Exceptional':score>=740?'Very Good':score>=670?'Good':score>=580?'Fair':'Poor';
  }
}

function drawNetWorthChart(){
  const canvas=$('nw-chart'); if(!canvas)return;
  const dpr=window.devicePixelRatio||1;
  const W=canvas.parentElement.offsetWidth;const H=80;
  canvas.width=W*dpr;canvas.height=H*dpr;
  canvas.style.width=W+'px';canvas.style.height=H+'px';
  const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');ctx.scale(dpr,dpr);
  const hist=GS.nwHistory;if(hist.length<2)return;
  const mn=Math.min(...hist),mx=Math.max(...hist);
  const range=mx-mn||1;
  const pts=hist.map((v,i)=>[i/(hist.length-1)*W,H-10-((v-mn)/range)*(H-20)]);
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(pts[0][0],pts[0][1]);
  for(let i=1;i<pts.length;i++)ctx.lineTo(pts[i][0],pts[i][1]);
  const last=hist[hist.length-1];
  const grad=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,H);
  const col=last>=0?'rgba(0,200,83,.3)':'rgba(255,61,61,.3)';
  grad.addColorStop(0,col);grad.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
  ctx.lineTo(W,H);ctx.lineTo(0,H);ctx.closePath();ctx.fillStyle=grad;ctx.fill();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(pts[0][0],pts[0][1]);
  for(let i=1;i<pts.length;i++)ctx.lineTo(pts[i][0],pts[i][1]);
  ctx.strokeStyle=last>=0?'#00c853':'#ff3d3d';ctx.lineWidth=2;ctx.stroke();
  // Current dot
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(pts[pts.length-1][0],pts[pts.length-1][1],4,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle=last>=0?'#00c853':'#ff3d3d';ctx.fill();
}

function logEvent(text, type='info'){
  // Events feed
  const feed=$('events-feed');
  if(feed){
    const item=document.createElement('div');
    item.style.cssText='padding:4px 6px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;border-left:3px solid '+(type==='good'?'var(--green)':type==='bad'||type==='career'?'var(--red)':type==='gold'?'var(--gold)':'var(--blue)');
    item.textContent=text;
    feed.prepend(item);
    while(feed.children.length>15)feed.removeChild(feed.lastChild);
  }
  // Timeline
  addTimeline(text,type);
}

function addTimeline(text, type='info'){
  const feed=$('tl-feed'); if(!feed)return;
  const item=document.createElement('div');item.className='tl-item';
  const dotClass=type==='good'||type==='gold'?'good':type==='bad'||type==='career'?'bad':type==='gold'?'gold':'info';
  item.innerHTML=`<div class="tl-dot ${dotClass}"></div><div class="tl-age">${ageDisplay(GS.char)}</div><div class="tl-text">${text}</div>`;
  feed.prepend(item);
  while(feed.children.length>50)feed.removeChild(feed.lastChild);
}

function showNextEvent(){
  if(!GS.pendingEvents.length)return;
  const ev=GS.pendingEvents.shift();
  showEventModal(ev);
}

function showEventModal(ev){
  const overlay=$('modal-overlay');
  $('m-icon').textContent=ev.icon||'ðŸ’¬';
  const tagEl=$('m-tag');
  tagEl.textContent=ev.cat||'Event';
  tagEl.className='modal-tag '+(ev.cat==='opportunity'?'opp':ev.cat==='disaster'?'dis':ev.cat==='milestone'?'mil':ev.cat==='expense'?'exp':ev.cat==='tip'?'tip':'fla');
  $('m-title').textContent=ev.title;
  $('m-body').textContent=ev.desc;
  $('m-result').style.display='none';
  const choices=$('m-choices');choices.innerHTML='';
  for(let i=0;i<ev.choices.length;i++){
    const btn=document.createElement('button');btn.className='choice-btn';
    btn.textContent=ev.choices[i].text;
    btn.onclick=()=>resolveChoice(ev,i);
    choices.appendChild(btn);
  }
  overlay.classList.add('open');
}

function resolveChoice(ev, idx){
  const result=ev.choices[idx].fn(GS.char);
  const rEl=$('m-result');rEl.style.display='block';rEl.textContent=result;
  $('m-choices').innerHTML='<button class="choice-btn" onclick="closeModal()">Continue â†’</button>';
  logEvent(`${ev.title}: ${result}`, ev.cat==='disaster'?'bad':ev.cat==='opportunity'?'good':'info');
  const nw=calcNetWorth(GS.char,GS.inv);
  if(GS.nwHistory.length)GS.nwHistory[GS.nwHistory.length-1]=nw;
  updateUI(null, nw, nw);
}

function closeModal(){
  $('modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
  $('modal-box').classList.remove('wide');
  $('modal-box').classList.remove('compact');
  if(GS.pendingEvents.length>0) setTimeout(showNextEvent,200);
}
// Esc closes the modal
document.addEventListener('keydown', e=>{
  if(e.key==='Escape' && $('modal-overlay').classList.contains('open')) closeModal();
});

// â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�â•�

function showActionModal(title, desc, choices){
  const overlay=$('modal-overlay');
  $('m-icon').textContent='âš™ï¸�';
  $('m-tag').textContent='Action';$('m-tag').className='modal-tag fla';
  $('m-title').textContent=title;
  $('m-body').textContent=desc;
  $('m-result').style.display='none';
  const ch=$('m-choices');ch.innerHTML='';
  for(const c of choices){
    if(c.header){
      const h=document.createElement('div');
      h.textContent=c.header;
      h.style.cssText='font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;padding:6px 4px 2px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin-top:4px';
      ch.appendChild(h);
      continue;
    }
    const btn=document.createElement('button');btn.className='choice-btn';btn.textContent=c.text;
    btn.onclick=()=>{
      const res=c.fn();
      const rEl=$('m-result');rEl.style.display='block';rEl.textContent=res||'Done.';
      ch.innerHTML='<button class="choice-btn" onclick="closeModal()">OK</button>';
      const nw=calcNetWorth(GS.char,GS.inv);
      if(GS.nwHistory.length)GS.nwHistory[GS.nwHistory.length-1]=nw;
      updateUI(null,nw,nw);
    };
    ch.appendChild(btn);
  }
  const cancel=document.createElement('button');cancel.className='choice-btn';cancel.textContent='Cancel';
  cancel.onclick=closeModal;ch.appendChild(cancel);
  overlay.classList.add('open');
}

// â”€â”€ Mini sparkline chart for asset cards â”€â”€
function drawMiniChart(canvas, history, up){
  if(!canvas) return;
  const dpr=window.devicePixelRatio||1;
  const W=canvas.clientWidth||220, H=50;
  canvas.width=W*dpr; canvas.height=H*dpr;
  const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.scale(dpr,dpr);
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  if(!history||history.length<2){
    ctx.strokeStyle='#4a6a4a'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0,H/2); ctx.lineTo(W,H/2); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle=getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--muted');
    ctx.font='10px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('No history yet',W/2,H/2+14);
    return;
  }
  const mn=Math.min(...history), mx=Math.max(...history);
  const range=mx-mn||Math.abs(mn)*0.01||1;
  const pad=4;
  const pts=history.map((v,i)=>[i/(history.length-1)*W, H-pad-((v-mn)/range)*(H-pad*2)]);
  const col=up?'#00c853':'#ff3d3d';
  // fill gradient
  const grad=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,H);
  grad.addColorStop(0, up?'rgba(0,200,83,.35)':'rgba(255,61,61,.35)');
  grad.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pts[0][0],pts[0][1]);
  for(let i=1;i<pts.length;i++) ctx.lineTo(pts[i][0],pts[i][1]);
  ctx.lineTo(W,H); ctx.lineTo(0,H); ctx.closePath();
  ctx.fillStyle=grad; ctx.fill();
  // line
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pts[0][0],pts[0][1]);
  for(let i=1;i<pts.length;i++) ctx.lineTo(pts[i][0],pts[i][1]);
  ctx.strokeStyle=col; ctx.lineWidth=1.5; ctx.stroke();
  // end dot
  const last=pts[pts.length-1];
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(last[0],last[1],2.5,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle=col; ctx.fill();
}

// â”€â”€ Asset-grid modal for stocks â”€â”€
function showStockModal(){
  const inv=GS.inv, c=GS.char;
  const overlay=$('modal-overlay');
  $('modal-box').classList.add('wide');
  $('m-icon').textContent='ðŸ“ˆ';
  $('m-tag').textContent='Market'; $('m-tag').className='modal-tag fla';
  $('m-title').textContent='Stock Market';
  $('m-body').textContent=`Climate: ${inv.climate.toUpperCase()} Â· Cash: ${fmt$(c.checking)} Â· Prices update monthly.`;
  $('m-result').style.display='none';
  const ch=$('m-choices'); ch.innerHTML='';
  const grid=document.createElement('div'); grid.className='asset-grid';
  const cards=[];
  inv.stocks.forEach((s,idx)=>{
    const h=s.history||[s.price]; const prev=h.length>1?h[h.length-2]:s.price;
    const chg=prev>0?((s.price-prev)/prev*100):0;
    const pos=inv.portfolio[s.id];
    const owned=pos?pos.shares:0;
    const canAfford=c.checking>=s.price*10;
    const card=document.createElement('div'); card.className='asset-card'; card.setAttribute('data-stock-card', s.id);
    const defaultBuy = Math.max(100, Math.round(s.price*10));
    card.innerHTML=`
      <div class="ac-hdr"><div><div class="ac-name">${s.name}</div><div class="ac-ticker">${s.id} Â· ${s.sector||'stocks'}</div></div>
      <div style="text-align:right"><div class="ac-price">$${s.price.toFixed(2)}</div><div class="ac-chg ${chg>=0?'pos':'neg'}">${chg>=0?'+':''}${chg.toFixed(1)}%</div></div></div>
      <canvas class="ac-chart" id="ch-stk-${idx}"></canvas>
      <div class="ac-meta"><span>${owned?`Owned: ${owned} sh Â· ${fmt$(s.price*owned)}`:'Not held'}</span><span>1sh = $${s.price.toFixed(2)}</span></div>
      <div class="ac-actions">
        <input class="ac-buy-input" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="${defaultBuy}" data-buy-input="${s.id}" title="Dollar amount to invest">
        <button class="ac-btn buy" ${canAfford?'':'disabled'} data-buy="${s.id}">Buy $</button>
        <button class="ac-btn sell" ${owned?'':'disabled'} data-sell="${s.id}">Sell All</button>
      </div>`;
    grid.appendChild(card); cards.push({canvas:'ch-stk-'+idx, history:h, up:chg>=0});
  });
  ch.appendChild(grid);
  const closeBtn=document.createElement('button'); closeBtn.className='choice-btn'; closeBtn.textContent='Close';
  closeBtn.onclick=()=>{$('modal-box').classList.remove('wide'); closeModal();};
  ch.appendChild(closeBtn);
  function refreshStockCard(id){
    const s=inv.stocks.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!s) return;
    const card=grid.querySelector(`[data-stock-card="${id}"]`); if(!card) return;
    const pos=inv.portfolio[s.id]; const owned=pos?pos.shares:0;
    const meta=card.querySelector('.ac-meta');
    if(meta) meta.innerHTML=`<span>${owned?`Owned: ${owned} sh Â· ${fmt$(s.price*owned)}`:'Not held'}</span><span>1sh = $${s.price.toFixed(2)}</span>`;
    const sellBtn=card.querySelector('.ac-btn.sell'); if(sellBtn) sellBtn.disabled=!owned;
  }
  function refreshStockAffordability(){
    $('m-body').textContent=`Climate: ${inv.climate.toUpperCase()} Â· Cash: ${fmt$(c.checking)} Â· Prices update monthly.`;
    inv.stocks.forEach(stk=>{
      const b=grid.querySelector(`[data-buy="${stk.id}"]`);
      if(b) b.disabled=c.checking<stk.price;
    });
  }
  grid.onclick=(e)=>{
    const buyId=e.target.getAttribute('data-buy');
    const sellId=e.target.getAttribute('data-sell');
    if(buyId){
      const s=inv.stocks.find(x=>x.id===buyId);
      const input=grid.querySelector(`[data-buy-input="${buyId}"]`);
      const wanted=Math.max(0, Math.floor(parseFloat(input?.value)||0));
      if(wanted<s.price){ showToast(`Need at least $${s.price.toFixed(2)} for 1 share.`); return; }
      if(c.checking<wanted){ showToast('Not enough cash.'); return; }
      const shares=Math.floor(wanted / s.price);
      const cost=Math.round(shares * s.price);
      if(shares<1){ showToast('Amount buys 0 shares.'); return; }
      c.checking-=cost;
      if(!inv.portfolio[s.id]) inv.portfolio[s.id]={shares:0,avgCost:0};
      const p=inv.portfolio[s.id]; p.avgCost=(p.avgCost*p.shares+cost)/(p.shares+shares); p.shares+=shares;
      showToast(`Bought ${shares} ${s.id} for ${fmt$(cost)}`);
      refreshStockCard(buyId); refreshStockAffordability();
    }else if(sellId){
      const s=inv.stocks.find(x=>x.id===sellId); const p=inv.portfolio[sellId]; if(!p) return;
      const proceeds=Math.round(s.price*p.shares);
      const cg=Math.round((s.price-p.avgCost)*p.shares);
      const tax=cg>0?Math.round(cg*0.15):0;
      c.checking+=proceeds-tax;
      delete inv.portfolio[sellId];
      showToast(`Sold ${sellId} for ${fmt$(proceeds-tax)}`);
      refreshStockCard(sellId); refreshStockAffordability();
    }
  };
  overlay.classList.add('open');
  requestAnimationFrame(()=>cards.forEach(cd=>drawMiniChart($(cd.canvas), cd.history, cd.up)));
}

// â”€â”€ Asset-grid modal for crypto â”€â”€
function showCryptoModal(){
  const inv=GS.inv, c=GS.char;
  const overlay=$('modal-overlay');
  $('modal-box').classList.add('wide');
  $('m-icon').textContent='â‚¿';
  $('m-tag').textContent='Market'; $('m-tag').className='modal-tag fla';
  $('m-title').textContent='Crypto Market';
  $('m-body').textContent=`Climate: ${inv.climate.toUpperCase()} Â· Cash: ${fmt$(c.checking)} Â· Extremely volatile. Prices update monthly.`;
  $('m-result').style.display='none';
  const ch=$('m-choices'); ch.innerHTML='';
  const grid=document.createElement('div'); grid.className='asset-grid';
  const cards=[];
  inv.cryptos.forEach((coin,idx)=>{
    const h=coin.history||[coin.price]; const prev=h.length>1?h[h.length-2]:coin.price;
    const chg=prev>0?((coin.price-prev)/prev*100):0;
    const pos=inv.cryptoHeld[coin.id];
    const owned=pos?pos.coins:0;
    const canAfford=c.checking>=1000;
    const priceLbl=coin.price>=1000?'$'+(coin.price/1000).toFixed(2)+'k':coin.price>=1?'$'+coin.price.toFixed(2):'$'+coin.price.toFixed(5);
    const card=document.createElement('div'); card.className='asset-card'; card.setAttribute('data-crypto-card', coin.id);
    card.innerHTML=`
      <div class="ac-hdr"><div><div class="ac-name">${coin.name}</div><div class="ac-ticker">${coin.id}</div></div>
      <div style="text-align:right"><div class="ac-price">${priceLbl}</div><div class="ac-chg ${chg>=0?'pos':'neg'}">${chg>=0?'+':''}${chg.toFixed(1)}%</div></div></div>
      <canvas class="ac-chart" id="ch-cry-${idx}"></canvas>
      <div class="ac-meta"><span>${owned?`Owned: ${owned.toFixed(4)} Â· ${fmt$(coin.price*owned)}`:'Not held'}</span><span>1 = ${priceLbl}</span></div>
      <div class="ac-actions">
        <input class="ac-buy-input" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="1000" data-buy-input="${coin.id}" title="Dollar amount to invest">
        <button class="ac-btn buy" ${canAfford?'':'disabled'} data-buy="${coin.id}">Buy $</button>
        <button class="ac-btn sell" ${owned?'':'disabled'} data-sell="${coin.id}">Sell All</button>
      </div>`;
    grid.appendChild(card); cards.push({canvas:'ch-cry-'+idx, history:h, up:chg>=0});
  });
  ch.appendChild(grid);
  const closeBtn=document.createElement('button'); closeBtn.className='choice-btn'; closeBtn.textContent='Close';
  closeBtn.onclick=()=>{$('modal-box').classList.remove('wide'); closeModal();};
  ch.appendChild(closeBtn);
  function refreshCryptoCard(id){
    const coin=inv.cryptos.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!coin) return;
    const card=grid.querySelector(`[data-crypto-card="${id}"]`); if(!card) return;
    const pos=inv.cryptoHeld[coin.id]; const owned=pos?pos.coins:0;
    const priceLbl=coin.price>=1000?'$'+(coin.price/1000).toFixed(2)+'k':coin.price>=1?'$'+coin.price.toFixed(2):'$'+coin.price.toFixed(5);
    const meta=card.querySelector('.ac-meta');
    if(meta) meta.innerHTML=`<span>${owned?`Owned: ${owned.toFixed(4)} Â· ${fmt$(coin.price*owned)}`:'Not held'}</span><span>1 = ${priceLbl}</span>`;
    const sellBtn=card.querySelector('.ac-btn.sell'); if(sellBtn) sellBtn.disabled=!owned;
  }
  function refreshCryptoAffordability(){
    $('m-body').textContent=`Climate: ${inv.climate.toUpperCase()} Â· Cash: ${fmt$(c.checking)} Â· Extremely volatile. Prices update monthly.`;
    inv.cryptos.forEach(coin=>{
      const b=grid.querySelector(`[data-buy="${coin.id}"]`);
      if(b) b.disabled=c.checking<1;
    });
  }
  grid.onclick=(e)=>{
    const buyId=e.target.getAttribute('data-buy');
    const sellId=e.target.getAttribute('data-sell');
    if(buyId){
      const coin=inv.cryptos.find(x=>x.id===buyId);
      const input=grid.querySelector(`[data-buy-input="${buyId}"]`);
      const wanted=Math.max(0, Math.floor(parseFloat(input?.value)||0));
      if(wanted<1){ showToast('Enter a dollar amount.'); return; }
      if(c.checking<wanted){ showToast('Not enough cash.'); return; }
      const coins=wanted/coin.price;
      c.checking-=wanted;
      if(!inv.cryptoHeld[coin.id]) inv.cryptoHeld[coin.id]={coins:0,avgCost:0};
      const p=inv.cryptoHeld[coin.id]; p.avgCost=(p.avgCost*p.coins+wanted)/(p.coins+coins); p.coins+=coins;
      showToast(`Bought ${coins.toFixed(4)} ${coin.id} for ${fmt$(wanted)}`);
      refreshCryptoCard(buyId); refreshCryptoAffordability();
    }else if(sellId){
      const coin=inv.cryptos.find(x=>x.id===sellId); const p=inv.cryptoHeld[sellId]; if(!p) return;
      const proceeds=coin.price*p.coins;
      const tax=proceeds>p.avgCost*p.coins?Math.round((proceeds-p.avgCost*p.coins)*0.15):0;
      c.checking+=proceeds-tax;
      delete inv.cryptoHeld[sellId];
      showToast(`Sold ${sellId} for ${fmt$(proceeds-tax)}`);
      refreshCryptoCard(sellId); refreshCryptoAffordability();
    }
  };
  overlay.classList.add('open');
  requestAnimationFrame(()=>cards.forEach(cd=>drawMiniChart($(cd.canvas), cd.history, cd.up)));
}

$('btn-job').onclick=()=>{
  const c=GS.char;

  if(c.retired){showToast('You\'re retired!');return;}

function openWorkModal(tab){
  const c = GS.char;
  const employedLine = c.employed ? `Job: ${c.jobTitle} â€” ${fmt$(c.salary)}/yr` : 'Unemployed';
  const sideLine = c.sideHustleIncome ? ` Â· Side: ${fmt$(c.sideHustleIncome)}/yr` : '';
  const headline = `${employedLine}${sideLine}`;
  let choices;
  if(tab === 'side'){
    const hustles = [...SIDE_HUSTLES].sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5).slice(0,6);
    choices = hustles.map(h=>{
      const statNote = h.stat==='smarts'?' Â· smarts':h.stat==='looks'?' Â· looks':'';
      const costNote = h.cost>0?`$${(h.cost/1000).toFixed(1)}k start`:'free';
      return {text:`${h.icon} ${h.name} â€” ${costNote}${statNote}`, fn(){return runSideHustle(h);}};
    });
    choices.push({text:'ðŸ”„ Refresh side projects', fn(){ setTimeout(()=>openWorkModal('side'),80); return 'Looking at other options...'; }});
  } else {
    choices = buildJobChoices(c);
  }
  showActionModal('Work', headline, choices);
  $('modal-box').classList.add('compact');
  const ch = $('m-choices');
  const tabBar = document.createElement('div');
  tabBar.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:sticky;top:0;background:var(--bg2);z-index:2';
  const mkTab = (id, label) => {
    const b = document.createElement('button');
    b.textContent = label;
    const active = id === tab;
    b.style.cssText = `flex:1;padding:10px 8px;background:${active?'var(--bg3)':'transparent'};border:none;border-bottom:2px solid ${active?'var(--gold)':'transparent'};color:${active?'var(--gold)':'var(--muted)'};font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;border-radius:6px 6px 0 0`;
    b.onclick = () => openWorkModal(id);
    return b;
  };
  tabBar.appendChild(mkTab('careers', 'ðŸ’¼ Careers'));
  tabBar.appendChild(mkTab('side', 'âš¡ Side Projects'));
  ch.insertBefore(tabBar, ch.firstChild);
}

$('btn-bank').onclick=()=>{
  const c=GS.char;
  const cur = c.bankId ? bankById(c.bankId) : null;
  const sector = c.jobSector;
  const headline = cur
    ? `Bank: ${cur.icon} ${cur.name} Â· Fee ${fmt$(cur.fee)}/mo Â· APY +${cur.apyBonus.toFixed(1)}%`
    : 'No bank yet. Pick one to unlock insurance, bonuses, and APY perks.';
  const choices = [
    {text:`Move $5k to Savings (2% APY)`,fn(){if(c.checking<5000)return'Not enough in checking.';c.checking-=5000;c.savings+=5000;return`Moved $5,000 to savings.`}},
    {text:`Move $5k to High-Yield (4%${cur?` +${cur.apyBonus.toFixed(1)}%`:''})`,fn(){if(c.checking<5000)return'Not enough in checking.';c.checking-=5000;c.highYield+=5000;return`Moved $5,000 to high-yield savings.`}},
    {text:`Personal Loan $10k (11.5% APR)`,fn(){c.checking+=10000;c.debt+=10000;return`Loan approved. +$10,000 cash, +$10,000 debt.`}},
    {text:`Pay off $5k debt`,fn(){if(c.checking<5000)return'Not enough.';if(c.debt<5000)return`Debt is only ${fmt$(c.debt)}.`;c.checking-=5000;c.debt-=5000;return`Paid $5,000 debt. Remaining: ${fmt$(c.debt)}`}},
  ];
  // If player has a bank, show current coverage first
  if(cur){
    const covTxt = Object.entries(cur.covers).map(([k,v])=>`${k}:${Math.round(v*100)}%`).join(' Â· ');
    choices.push({text:`ðŸ›¡ï¸� View my coverage (${covTxt||'none'})`, fn(){
      return `${cur.icon} ${cur.name}\n${cur.blurb}\nFee: ${fmt$(cur.fee)}/mo Â· Signup: ${fmt$(cur.signupBonus)} Â· APY +${cur.apyBonus.toFixed(1)}%\n\nCoverage: ${covTxt||'â€”'}`;
    }});
  }
  // Browse all 20 banks â€” sector-matched banks sort first
  const rankedBanks = [...BANKS].sort((a,b)=>{
    const as = sector && a.suits.includes(sector) ? 1 : 0;
    const bs = sector && b.suits.includes(sector) ? 1 : 0;
    return bs - as;
  });
  for(const b of rankedBanks){
    const isMine = cur && cur.id===b.id;
    const fit = sector && b.suits.includes(sector) ? ' â­�FIT' : '';
    const mineTag = isMine ? ' âœ… CURRENT' : '';
    const covTop = Object.entries(b.covers).sort((x,y)=>y[1]-x[1]).slice(0,2)
      .map(([k,v])=>`${k} ${Math.round(v*100)}%`).join(', ');
    choices.push({
      text:`${b.icon} ${b.name}${fit}${mineTag} â€” ${fmt$(b.fee)}/mo Â· ${covTop||'basic'}`,
      fn(){
        if(isMine) return `Already a member at ${b.name}.`;
        return joinBank(c, b.id);
      }
    });
  }
  showActionModal('Banking', headline, choices);
  $('modal-box').classList.add('compact');
};

$('btn-realty').onclick=()=>{
  const inv=GS.inv,c=GS.char;
  const m=CLIMATE_MULT[inv.climate]||CLIMATE_MULT.normal;
  const tiers=[
    {name:'Starter Condo',price:Math.round(ri(150000,280000)*m.re)},
    {name:'2BR House',price:Math.round(ri(280000,500000)*m.re)},
    {name:'3BR House',price:Math.round(ri(450000,750000)*m.re)},
    {name:'Luxury Home',price:Math.round(ri(800000,2000000)*m.re)},
  ];
  const choices=tiers.map(t=>{
    const down=Math.round(t.price*0.2); const debt=t.price-down;
    const mp=Math.round(debt*(0.065/12)*Math.pow(1+0.065/12,360)/(Math.pow(1+0.065/12,360)-1));
    return{text:`Buy ${t.name}: ${fmt$(t.price)} (${fmt$(down)} down, ${fmt$(mp)}/mo mortgage)`,fn(){
      if(c.checking<down)return`Need ${fmt$(down)} for down payment.`;
      c.checking-=down;
      const isFirst = !inv.properties.some(p=>p.livedIn);
      inv.properties.push({name:t.name,value:t.price,debt,monthlyPayment:mp,rented:false,rent:Math.round(t.price*0.006),age:0,livedIn:isFirst});
      c.hasHouse=inv.properties.some(p=>p.livedIn);
      return`Bought ${t.name}! Equity: ${fmt$(down)}${isFirst?' Â· Moved in.':''}`;
    }};
  });
  // Per-property options: move in/out, rent toggle, sell
  for(let i=0;i<inv.properties.length;i++){
    const p=inv.properties[i];
    const tag=p.livedIn?' ðŸ�¡ (living here)':p.rented?' ðŸ’° (renting out)':' (vacant)';
    if(!p.livedIn){
      choices.push({text:`Move into ${p.name}${tag}`,fn(){
        inv.properties.forEach(x=>x.livedIn=false);
        p.livedIn=true; p.rented=false;
        c.hasHouse=true;
        return`Moved into ${p.name}. Your new home!`;
      }});
    } else {
      choices.push({text:`Move out of ${p.name}${tag}`,fn(){
        p.livedIn=false;
        c.hasHouse=inv.properties.some(x=>x.livedIn);
        return`Moved out of ${p.name}. Now paying rent elsewhere.`;
      }});
    }
    if(!p.livedIn){
      if(!p.rented) choices.push({text:`Rent out ${p.name} (~${fmt$(p.rent)}/mo)`,fn(){p.rented=true;return`Now renting for ${fmt$(p.rent)}/mo!`}});
      else choices.push({text:`Stop renting ${p.name}`,fn(){p.rented=false;return'Stopped renting.'}});
    }
    choices.push({text:`Sell ${p.name} (equity: ${fmt$(p.value-p.debt)})${tag}`,fn(){
      const eq=p.value-p.debt; c.checking+=eq;
      inv.properties.splice(i,1);
      c.hasHouse=inv.properties.some(x=>x.livedIn);
      return`Sold for ${fmt$(eq)} net equity.${!c.hasHouse?' Back to renting.':''}`;
    }});
  }
  choices.unshift({text:'ðŸš— Browse Vehicles (cars, bikes, boats, planes)',fn(){setTimeout(()=>showVehiclesModal(),50);return'Opening vehicles...';}});
  showActionModal('Real Estate','Buy properties to live in, rent out, or flip. Also browse vehicles from here.',choices);
};

// â”€â”€ Vehicles modal â€” cars, motorcycles, boats, planes (with EVs) â”€â”€
function showVehiclesModal(){
  const inv=GS.inv, c=GS.char;
  if(!inv.vehicles) inv.vehicles=[];
  const choices=[];
  // Group catalog by type for readability
  const order=['car','motorcycle','boat','plane'];
  const labels={car:'ðŸš— CARS',motorcycle:'ðŸ��ï¸� MOTORCYCLES',boat:'â›µ BOATS',plane:'âœˆï¸� PLANES'};
  for(const type of order){
    const items=VEHICLE_CATALOG.filter(v=>v.type===type);
    for(const v of items){
      const evTag = v.isElectric ? ' âš¡EV' : '';
      const canAfford = c.checking>=v.price;
      choices.push({
        text:`${v.icon} ${v.name}${evTag} â€” ${fmt$(v.price)} Â· ${fmt$(v.monthlyCost)}/mo`,
        fn(){
          if(c.checking<v.price) return`Need ${fmt$(v.price)}.`;
          c.checking-=v.price;
          inv.vehicles.push({...v, value:v.price, age:0});
          return`Bought ${v.name}! Current fleet value: ${fmt$(totalVehicleValue(inv))}.`;
        }
      });
    }
  }
  // Sell options
  if(inv.vehicles.length){
    for(let i=0;i<inv.vehicles.length;i++){
      const v=inv.vehicles[i];
      const ageYrs=((v.age||0)/12).toFixed(1);
      choices.unshift({
        text:`ðŸ’¸ Sell ${v.icon} ${v.name} â€” value: ${fmt$(v.value)} (${ageYrs}yr old)`,
        fn(){
          // Private sale takes ~5% loss vs market value
          const proceeds=Math.round(v.value*0.95);
          c.checking+=proceeds;
          inv.vehicles.splice(i,1);
          return`Sold for ${fmt$(proceeds)}.`;
        }
      });
    }
  }
  choices.unshift({text:'ðŸ�  Back to Properties',fn(){setTimeout(()=>$('btn-realty').click(),50);return'Back to real estate...';}});
  showActionModal('Vehicles','Cars, bikes, boats, planes. âš¡ = Electric.',choices);
  $('modal-box').classList.add('compact');
}

  {icon:'ðŸ“ˆ',name:'Day Trading',desc:'Trade stocks intraday. Most lose money.',cost:3000,incMin:-5000,incMax:50000,success:0.25,stat:'smarts'},
  {icon:'ðŸŽ°',name:'Sports Betting Arbitrage',desc:'Cross-book bets exploiting line differences.',cost:2000,incMin:-3000,incMax:15000,success:0.35,stat:'smarts'},
];

function runSideHustle(h){
  const c=GS.char;
  if(c.checking<h.cost) return `Need ${fmt$(h.cost)} startup capital.`;
  c.checking-=h.cost;
  let successRate=h.success;
  if(h.stat==='smarts') successRate=clamp(successRate*(0.5+c.smarts/100),0,0.95);
  else if(h.stat==='looks') successRate=clamp(successRate*(0.5+c.looks/100),0,0.95);
  if(pct(successRate)){
    const statMult = h.stat==='smarts'?(0.6+c.smarts/120):h.stat==='looks'?(0.6+c.looks/120):1.0;
    const inc = Math.round((h.incMin + Math.random()*(h.incMax-h.incMin)) * statMult);
    if(inc<=0){
      const loss=Math.abs(inc);
      return `${h.name} lost money. Down ${fmt$(loss+h.cost)} total.`;
    }
    c.sideHustleIncome=(c.sideHustleIncome||0)+inc;
    return `ðŸŽ‰ ${h.name} paying off! +${fmt$(inc)}/yr side-hustle income (tracked separately from job salary).`;
  }
  const loss = h.incMin<0 ? Math.round(Math.abs(h.incMin)*Math.random()) : 0;
  if(loss>0){ c.checking-=loss; return `â�Œ ${h.name} flopped. Lost ${fmt$(h.cost+loss)} total.`; }
  return `â�Œ ${h.name} didn't gain traction. Lost ${fmt$(h.cost)} startup.`;
}

$('btn-sponsors').onclick=()=>{
  const inv=GS.inv, c=GS.char;
  if(!sponsorsUnlocked(inv)){
    showToast('Sponsors unlock at $500k total business value.');
    return;
  }
  // Refresh offers once per visit if older than 3 months or missing
  const stale = !inv.sponsorOffers || !inv.sponsorOffers.length || (c.monthAge - (inv.sponsorOffersMonth||0) > 3);
  if(stale) rollSponsorOffers();
  const active = inv.sponsors||[];
  const activeLines = active.length
    ? `Active: ${active.map(s=>`${s.icon} ${s.name} (${fmt$(s.monthly)}/mo Â· ${s.monthsLeft}mo left)`).join(' Â· ')}`
    : 'No active sponsors yet.';
  const headline = `Total biz value: ${fmt$(totalBizValue(inv))}\n${activeLines}`;
  const choices = [];
  for(const o of (inv.sponsorOffers||[])){
    const alreadySigned = active.some(s=>s.name===o.name);
    if(alreadySigned) continue;
    const bonus = o.monthly * 3;
    choices.push({
      text:`${o.icon} ${o.name} â€” ${fmt$(o.monthly)}/mo Ã— ${o.months}mo Â· ${fmt$(bonus)} signing bonus`,
      fn(){ return signSponsor(o); }
    });
  }
  if(!choices.length){
    choices.push({text:'ðŸ“­ No offers right now â€” come back next month', fn(){return 'Check back after aging a few months.';}});
  }
  choices.push({text:'ðŸ”„ Refresh offers (next visit rerolls)', fn(){ rollSponsorOffers(); setTimeout(()=>$('btn-sponsors').click(),50); return 'Rerolled.'; }});

  $('modal-box').classList.add('compact');
};

function buyFitness(item){

  c.health    = clamp((c.health||75) + item.h, 0, 100);
  c.happiness = clamp((c.happiness||75) + item.p, 0, 100);
  showToast(`+${item.h} health, +${item.p} happiness`);
  return `Spent ${fmt$(item.cost)} on ${item.name}. +${item.h} health Â· +${item.p} happiness.`;
}

function loadGame(){
  try{const d=localStorage.getItem('finlife_save');if(!d)return false;const p=JSON.parse(d);GS.char=p.char;GS.inv=p.inv||createInvState();GS.nwHistory=p.nwHistory||[];GS.inbox=p.inbox||[];GS.billAccum=p.billAccum||[];
    // Migrations for older saves

    if(GS.inv.sponsorOffersMonth===undefined) GS.inv.sponsorOffersMonth=-1;
    for(const b of (GS.inv.businesses||[])){
      if(b.equipTier===undefined){ b.equipTier=1; b.equipAge=0; }

    return true;
  }catch(e){return false;}
}

  R16, QF, SF, Final results (two-legged aggregate, penalties if tied,
  single-match final) plus the tournament winner.

Pool includes top-division clubs from Europe, North America, and South
America per user request (Inter Miami, Club America, Flamengo,
Boca Juniors, etc.). Qualification persists via GS.char._euroComp set
by domestic standings (top 5=champions, 6=europa, 7=conference) and
seeded from team tier on first tick.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

finlife: Champions/Europa/Conference League fixtures + campaign summary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

tool_input.prompt:
You are part of a swarm testing FinLife jobs. Your slice: **healthcare** sector.

Run this exact command and capture stdout:
```
cd "C:\Users\noahm\Project\.playwright-cli" && node job-swarm-runner.js healthcare
```

The harness applies for each healthcare job, verifies employed/jobId/title/sector/tier/salary-range/bossMorale, and runs 3 career ticks. It outputs JSON with `{ sector, total, passed, failedCount, failedDetails, sample }`.

Browser-sync is on http://localhost:3000. If you see a WebSocket console-error in pageErrors, ignore it (it's the live-reload socket, not game code).

Report back in under 100 words:
- "Sector: healthcare â€” N/N passed" 
- Any failed jobs with their failedChecks or error
- Sample salary range observed (e.g., "Doctor $318k vs lo/hi $207kâ€“$345k")

Do not modify any files. Run the command, parse the JSON, summarize.

Run this exact command and capture stdout:
```
cd "C:\Users\noahm\Project\.playwright-cli" && node job-swarm-runner.js law
```

The harness applies for each law job, verifies employed/jobId/title/sector/tier/salary-range/bossMorale, and runs 3 career ticks. It outputs JSON with `{ sector, total, passed, failedCount, failedDetails, sample }`.

Browser-sync is on http://localhost:3000. If you see a WebSocket console-error in pageErrors, ignore it (it's the live-reload socket, not game code).

Report back in under 100 words:
- "Sector: law â€” N/N passed"
- Any failed jobs with their failedChecks or error
- Sample salary range observed

Do not modify any files. Run the command, parse the JSON, summarize.

```
cd "C:\Users\noahm\Project\.playwright-cli" && node job-swarm-runner.js sports
```

The harness applies for each sports job, verifies employed/jobId/title/sector/tier/salary-range/bossMorale, runs 3 career ticks, **plus** runs 30 sports-offer ticks and exercises tickSoccerSeason / tickNFLSeason / tickNHLSeason for soccer/football/hockey players. It outputs JSON with `{ sector, total, passed, failedCount, failedDetails, sample }`.

Browser-sync is on http://localhost:3000. If you see a WebSocket console-error in pageErrors, ignore it (it's the live-reload socket, not game code).

Report back in under 100 words:

- Any failed jobs with their failedChecks or error  
- Note whether sportsTickOK was true for soccer/football/hockey players (means season cycles ran without crashing)
- Sample salary range observed

Do not modify any files. Run the command, parse the JSON, summarize.
